review:
РЕШЕНИЕ ПРОБЛЕМЫ С УДАЛЕНИЕМ ИГРЫ (ОСВОБОЖДАЕМ 100+ ГБ)

 ⬇️ПОЛГОДА! Полгода я пытался полностью удалить этот симулятор из Steam! Из-за идиотской системы лаунчера Steam сносит всего 1-2 ГБ самого загрузчика, а остальные 100+ гигабайт карт, самолетов и текстур остаются мертвым грузом лежать у вас на диске. Поддержка ничем не помогла, только гоняла по кругу.

Если вы тоже обыскались, куда делось место после «удаления» игры, не ломайте голову. Всё решается вручную за 2 минуты. Как полностью вернуть свои гигабайты:

Нажмите на клавиатуре комбинацию клавиш Win + R.Вставьте в появившееся окно этот путь и нажмите Enter:

%appdata%\Microsoft Flight Simulator

Вы попадете в скрытую папку. Смело удаляйте папку Microsoft Flight Simulator целиком (лучше через Shift + Delete, чтобы не зависло в корзине). Именно там в папке Packages лежат все скрытые гигабайты.

Если папки там нет, нажмите снова Win + R, введите 

%localappdata%\Packages

найдите папку со словами Microsoft.FlightSimulator и зачистите остатки внутри нее (папки LocalCache или RoamingState).

Надеюсь, этот отзыв сбережет кому-то кучу нервов и кучу места на SSD.

review_english: SOLUTION TO THE PROBLEM WITH DELETION OF THE GAME (LEAVING 100 GB) FOR HALF A YEAR! For six months I tried to completely remove this simulator from Steam! Because of the idiotic launcher system, Steam only loses 1-2 GB of the loader itself, and the remaining 100 GB of maps, planes and textures remain dead weight on your disk. The support didn't help at all, it just kept me going in circles. If you also searched where the space went after deleting the game, don’t rack your brains. Everything is resolved manually in 2 minutes. How to completely get your gigabytes back Press the Win R key combination on your keyboard. Paste this path into the window that appears and press Enter appdata Microsoft Flight Simulator You will be taken to a hidden folder. Feel free to delete the entire Microsoft Flight Simulator folder (preferably via Shift Delete so it doesn’t get stuck in the trash). This is where all the hidden gigabytes are located in the Packages folder. If the folder is not there, press Win R again, enter localappdata Packages, find the folder with the words Microsoft.FlightSimulator and clear out the remains inside it (LocalCache or RoamingState folders). I hope this review will save someone a lot of nerves and a lot of SSD space.

review:
La verdad, siendo honesto, juegazo.
Este juego logra ser bastante jugable gracias a su realismo y telemetría en el mundo y aunque haya salido el MSFS2024 no lo he comprado debido que no creo que me me vaya muy bien en mi laptop y que no es tan estable, pero el MSFS2020 todavía sigue activo con una gran comunidad.
Puede llegar a ser aun mas disfrutable si te puedes lograr comprar Yokes o Sidesticks como los que usan en los Airbus/Boeing para tener una sensación más realista al pilotar aviones, también hay más accesorios que venden los cuales pueden ser como el MCDU, Thrusters, y más.
También puedes lograr instalar mods o conseguir aviones, aeropuertos y "liveries" (los diseños del aviones como los de aerolíneas, para dar un ejemplo, Air France).
También tiene comunidades como VATSIM, IVAO y más que hacen simulaciones aún mas realistas ya que simulan el contacto de torre de control con el piloto logrando una experiencia más real y fiel a la realidad.

Y bueno eso es todo, por favor Microsoft o Xbox hagan más juegos como estos.

Puede llegar a ser aun mas disfrutable si te puedes lograr comprar Yokes o Sidesticks como los que usan en los Airbus Boeing para tener una sensación más realista al pilotar aviones, también hay más accesorios que venden los cuales pueden ser como el MCDU, Thrusters, y más. También puedes lograr instalar mods o conseguir aviones, aeropuertos y "liveries" (los diseños del aviones como los de aerolíneas, para dar un ejemplo, Air France). También tiene comunidades como VATSIM, IVAO y más que hacen simulaciones aún mas realistas ya que simulan el contacto de torre de control con el piloto logrando una experiencia más real y fiel a la realidad. Y bueno eso es todo, por favor Microsoft o Xbox hagan más juegos como estos.
review_english: The truth is, to be honest, it's a great game. This game manages to be quite playable thanks to its realism and telemetry in the world and although MSFS2024 has been released I have not bought it because I don't think it will work very well on my laptop and it is not that stable, but MSFS2020 is still active with a large community. It can be even more enjoyable if you can buy Yokes or Sidesticks like the ones used on Boeing Airbuses to have a more realistic feeling when flying airplanes. There are also more accessories they sell which can be like the MCDU, Thrusters, and more. You can also install mods or get airplanes, airports and "liveries" (the designs of airplanes like those of airlines, to give an example, Air France). It also has communities such as VATSIM, IVAO and more that make simulations even more realistic since they simulate the contact between the control tower and the pilot, achieving a more real and faithful experience. And well that's all, please Microsoft or Xbox make more games like these.

review: Despues de haber jugado bastantes horas, es momento de dar mi opinión. El juego en si, es una maravilla. Tiene sus "pequeños" bugs, pero es mucho mas estable que el 2024, que sin menospreciar su continuación, hasta que no esté completamente estabilizado y que los mods y Add-ons funcionen al 100% como en el 2020, permaneceré aquí. Para tener una experiencia de primer nivel, se recomienda tener una pc potente para poder exprimirlo, de lo contrario se sufre. En mi caso con un Ultra Wide 9, una 5080 y 64 GB de Ram, corre excelente. A veces hay caídas de FPS en ciertos aeropuertos de mayor complejidad, pero éso se resuelve bajando un poco la calidad gráfica sin sacrificar demasiado. Espero que Asobo resuelva problemas con el 2024 y lo deje bien afinado para pasar definitivamente. Mientras tanto, seguiré disfrutando del 2020.

review_english: After having played many hours, it is time to give my opinion. The game itself is wonderful. It has its "small" bugs, but it is much more stable than 2024, which without underestimating its continuation, until it is completely stabilized and the mods and Add-ons work 100% as in 2020, I will remain here. To have a first-class experience, it is recommended to have a powerful PC to be able to squeeze it out, otherwise you will suffer. In my case with an Ultra Wide 9, a 5080 and 64 GB of Ram, it runs excellent. Sometimes there are FPS drops in certain more complex airports, but this is resolved by lowering the graphic quality a little without sacrificing too much. I hope Asobo solves problems with 2024 and leaves it well tuned to pass definitively. In the meantime, I will continue enjoying 2020.

review:
MFS2020 is a masterpiece, a monumental achievement in gaming, photgrammetry, and simulation....yet, it is not for everyone. 

How can a masterpiece of a game not be for everyone you might ask? Well the answer for this is simple. This is not a normal "game" in the sense that most people are familiar with. MFS2020 lacks a narrative, has no real missions, no career mode (although it should), no characters, etc. So why play it? For what is lacks in story and progression, it makes up for with its near-infinite sandbox, graphical fidelity, simulation depth, and learning curve. 

I've been playing MFS since 2006 when I was just ten years old and got my hands on MFS X. I was instantly addicted to the difficulty and the beauty of that game. And over time, little pre-teen me was able to figure out how to fly airliners in an age when youtube tutorials were in their infancy. 

14 years later, MFS2020 released with the announcement that by using a combination of satellite photogrammetry and hand crafted models, Microsoft had essentially put the entire Earth into the video game. You can literally fly over your house--at least as it appeared on Bing Maps in 2020 anyway, you can see every house in your community, follow the traffic down the road you take to work, see landmarks around the world, and so on. Moreover, they implemented a system to import live weather conditions, which combined with the improved volumetric weather and cloud system produces insanely life-like simulation. It's truly an achievement that few other games can boast. 

What you are left with is a game that will absolutely satisfy you if you are a fan of aviation, hardcore simulation, or just want to sit back and soar above the clouds while listening to music or an audiobook. The sandbox is yours to do what you want. You can fly a little prop plane around your community, or roleplay as an airline captain with routes and rigid checklists and so on. 

But again, this is not an experience for everyone. There are many people who will boot this up, play for a few hours,  and say "okay so this is it?" And that's fine.  But if you want to dig into a deep, beautiful simulation game, the sky is the limit.

review:
Gráficos:
☑ Arte puro (Ver el amanecer por encima de las nubes a 30,000 pies es de otro mundo)
☐ Buenos
☐ Decentes
☐ Si te quedas fijo mirando, pixelas

Jugabilidad:
☐ Adictiva como el café de la mañana
☑ Disfrutable para pasar el rato (Planificar vuelos de aerolínea, activar el piloto automático y disfrutar del viaje)
☐ Se deja jugar
☐ Necesitas un manual de ingeniería (Puedes configurar las asistencias para que sea accesible o ponerlo en plan simulación pura donde cada botón de la cabina funciona)

Rendimiento / Optimización:
☐ Va como un tiro, finísimo
☐ Estable
☑ Exige más de lo que da (El verdadero jefe final para tu procesador y tu tarjeta gráfica)
☐ Diapositivas en alta definición

Lore / Historia:
☐ Obra maestra
☐ Entretenida
☐ Está ahí para justificar que rompas cosas
☑ No tiene / El lore es no estrellar un avión de 80 toneladas contra el suelo en el aterrizaje

Conclusión: Si tienes un SSD con espacio de sobra, paciencia para las actualizaciones y te gusta la aviación comercial o general, es el simulador definitivo. Una maravilla visual.

Una maravilla visual.
review_english: Graphics Pure art (Seeing the sunrise above the clouds at 30,000 feet is from another world) Good Decent If you stare, you pixelate Gameplay Addictive like morning coffee Enjoyable to pass the time (Plan airline flights, activate the autopilot and enjoy the trip) It's playable You need an engineering manual (You can configure the assists to be accessible or put it in a pure simulation plan where every button in the cockpit works) Performance Optimization Goes like a shooting, very fine Stable Demands more than it gives (The real final boss for your processor and your graphics card) High definition slides Lore History Masterpiece Entertaining It is there to justify you breaking things It does not have The lore is not crashing an 80-ton plane into the ground on landing Conclusion If you have an SSD with plenty of space, patience for updates and you like commercial or general aviation, it is the definitive simulator. A visual marvel.

review: Je regrette complètement cet achat. Derrière une vitrine technologique impressionnante se cache un jeu d’une pauvreté incroyable en termes de gameplay. On décolle, on vole pendant des heures sans qu’il ne se passe quoi que ce soit d’intéressant, puis on atterrit. Les avions militaires sont présents mais sans missions adaptées, sans objectifs, sans contenu qui justifie réellement leur existence. Le monde est magnifique, mais un beau décor ne remplace pas un jeu. À ce prix, j’attendais une expérience vivante ; j’ai eu l’impression de payer pour une démonstration technique interminable.
review_clean: Je regrette complètement cet achat. Derrière une vitrine technologique impressionnante se cache un jeu d une pauvreté incroyable en termes de gameplay. On décolle, on vole pendant des heures sans qu il ne se passe quoi que ce soit d intéressant, puis on atterrit. Les avions militaires sont présents mais sans missions adaptées, sans objectifs, sans contenu qui justifie réellement leur existence. Le monde est magnifique, mais un beau décor ne remplace pas un jeu. À ce prix, j attendais une expérience vivante j ai eu l impression de payer pour une démonstration technique interminable.
review_english: I completely regret this purchase. Behind an impressive technological showcase hides a game of incredible poverty in terms of gameplay. We take off, we fly for hours without anything interesting happening, then we land. Military planes are present but without adapted missions, without objectives, without content which really justifies their existence. The world is magnificent, but a beautiful setting is no substitute for a game. At this price, I expected a lively experience; I felt like I was paying for an endless technical demonstration.

Как симулятор самолётов для рядовых игроков, желающих просто полетать не подойдет. Слишком трудно и много профессионального авиационного контента. Для комфортной игры как минимум нужен сайдстик/штурвал и руды, а это еще плюс к цене игры. 

В игре багов не нашел, музыка приятная, графика тоже.

I didn’t find any bugs in the game, the music is nice, the graphics are nice too. Is it because of the price of everything possible, my rating is 7.5 10

review: I love Microsoft update simulator 2020 it really captures the perfect update experience don't get bogged down with playing games when you could just be updating them all the time. And don't think this is another streamlined easy player out of the box update experience it's going to require multiple crashes and restarts along the way very much a hands-on experience. I love the consistency as well for example according to steam I have played this game for 67.5 hours and I don't think I've spent more than one or two hours in game at most which is a godsend because I can't stand having to actually play the game I much prefer the update experience. If you too want a impossibly long painful experience dragged out in perpetuity pick up Microsoft flight simulator today a game that you pay full price for and then have to buy individual planes at a costly additional DLC per each price. Oh and don't stop there because if you actually want to make space for the enjoyable experience of continuously updating the game you never play you better be prepared to delete everything else in your library or be buying this sarlac pit of data its own hard drive because as of posting it's over 160 gigs.

review:
Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is one of the most impressive simulation games ever released, and even years later, it still feels like a benchmark title for what a modern simulator can be. It is not just a game where you fly planes from one airport to another. It is a full aviation sandbox that gives you the entire world, thousands of airports, real weather, realistic flight systems, beautiful aircraft, and endless opportunities to learn, explore, and improve.

The strongest part of Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is its sense of scale. Being able to take off from your local airport, fly over your own city, cross oceans, visit famous landmarks, land in remote mountain strips, or recreate real airline routes is incredible. The game makes aviation feel global in a way very few titles ever have. Whether you want to fly a short VFR sightseeing route in a Cessna 172 or plan a full IFR airline flight across the country, the game gives you the tools to do it.

The visuals are absolutely outstanding. The world looks gorgeous from the air, especially with live weather, changing cloud layers, sunsets, storms, snow, and realistic lighting. Flying through mountain ranges, along coastlines, over cities, or into busy airports can genuinely feel cinematic. The weather system is one of the biggest highlights because it adds so much atmosphere and challenge. A calm daytime flight feels relaxing, while a night approach in rain, low visibility, and crosswinds can feel intense and rewarding.

The aircraft selection is also a major strength. The simulator gives players a wide range of flying experiences, from small general aviation aircraft to business jets, airliners, turboprops, bush planes, floatplanes, and helicopters depending on your installed content. Each aircraft has its own personality, handling, cockpit layout, and learning curve. Some are great for casual exploration, while others demand more serious study and procedure knowledge. That flexibility is one of the reasons the sim has such long-term value.

For beginners, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is surprisingly approachable. You can turn on assists, use simplified controls, follow tutorials, and slowly build your skills. For more serious sim pilots, there is enough depth to practice navigation, radio work, instrument flying, aircraft systems, flight planning, weather decision-making, and proper procedures. It does a great job of being accessible without completely sacrificing realism. You can treat it like a relaxing flying game or a serious training-style simulator, depending on how much effort you want to put in.

The cockpit experience is excellent. Sitting in a detailed cockpit, managing switches, setting up navigation, adjusting radios, monitoring instruments, and flying an approach gives the sim a strong sense of immersion. With a good joystick, throttle, rudder pedals, or yoke setup, the experience becomes even better. The game rewards hardware investment, but it does not require a full cockpit setup to be enjoyable.

The flight planning and navigation side of the game is another major selling point. You can fly visually by landmarks, use GPS, follow VORs, fly IFR routes, shoot instrument approaches, or use third-party tools to create more realistic airline-style flights. There is a real sense of accomplishment when you plan a route, depart properly, navigate across distance, manage fuel, descend on profile, and land successfully at your destination.

The airport coverage is massive. Even small local airports are represented, and the handcrafted airports add extra detail to major locations. The ability to fly almost anywhere on Earth gives the game unmatched replay value. You are never really “done” with Microsoft Flight Simulator because there is always another route, aircraft, region, airport, weather condition, or challenge to try.

The community and add-on ecosystem are also huge positives. There are aircraft, liveries, scenery improvements, airports, utilities, mods, and flight planning tools that can dramatically expand the experience. The marketplace and external add-on community help keep the simulator fresh. Whether you are into airliners, bush flying, helicopters, military-style flying, historical aircraft, or general aviation, there is almost always something available to support that niche.

Performance can vary depending on your system, settings, and location, but when the sim is running well, it is one of the most immersive experiences on PC. It is demanding, but that is not surprising considering what it is trying to do. This is a game rendering the entire planet, complex aircraft, weather, traffic, lighting, and huge amounts of scenery. With the right settings dialed in, the experience is absolutely worth it.

One of the best things about Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is that it creates memorable moments constantly. Taking off from a small mountain airport at sunrise, flying over your hometown, landing at a major international airport in bad weather, cruising above cloud layers, or finding a random remote airstrip can all feel special. It captures the freedom and beauty of aviation better than almost anything else.

It also has real educational value. You can learn basic aerodynamics, airport operations, navigation, weather awareness, aircraft systems, and flight procedures. It will not replace real flight training, but it can absolutely help build familiarity with cockpit layouts, navigation concepts, checklists, and aviation terminology. For anyone interested in aviation, it is a fantastic entry point.

Overall, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is a landmark simulator. It is beautiful, detailed, flexible, massive in scope, and endlessly replayable. It works both as a relaxing exploration game and as a serious aviation platform. Whether you are a casual player who wants to see the world from above or an aviation enthusiast who wants to practice realistic procedures, there is a tremendous amount of value here.

Final Verdict: Absolutely recommended. Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is not just one of the best flight simulators available; it is one of the most impressive simulation experiences ever made.

review:
Další verze civilního leteckého simulátrou od Microsoftu. Microsoft výrobu tentokrát svěřil francouzskému studiu Asobo, jež má na svědomí třeba akční adventuru A Plague Tale se skvělou grafikou. Aby se to lépe pletlo, tak hra nemá žádné označení verze. Vzhledem k tomu, že vyšla v roce 2020, tak jsem mu dal neoficiálně do závorky tohle datum - někde se to tak také uvádí.
Simulátor samozřejmě vylepšil hlavně grafickou stránku hry. Stačí se podívat na grafické scenérie v tomto, nebo tomto videu a budete slintat blahem. :)
Co se týče letadel, tak základní Standard Edition měla při vydání 20 kusů:

Turbovrtulové:
Daher TBM 930
Beechcraft King Air 350i
Cessna 208 B Grand Caravan EX

Moderní airlinery:
Airbus A320neo (+ v2)
Boeing 747-8 Intercontinental

Vrtulové:
Diamond DA62
EXTRA 330LT
Flight Design CTSL
ICON A5
JMB VL-3
Robin Cap10
Robin DR400/100 Cadet
Beechcraft Bonanza G36
Cessna 152
Cessna 172 SkyHawk (G1000) (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi)
Zlin Savage Cub
CubCrafters X Cub (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi)
Diamond DA40NG
Aviat Pitts Special S-2S

Tryskové:
Cessna Citation CJ4

V bezplatném updatu v listopadu 2021 přibylo dalších 5:

Tryskové:
Boeing F/A-18E/F Super Hornet

Turbovrtulové:
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 floats (plováky)
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter skis (lyže)
Aviat Pitts Special S-1S
CubCrafters NXCub
Volocopter VoloCity (eVTOL – létající taxi)

40th Anniversary Edition: v listopadu 2022 na 40. výročí vydání prvního Flight Simulátoru byla hra bezplatně povýšena na tuhle edici. Nový obsah této edice (kromě placených přídavků) je majitelům základní hry k dispozici zdarma.
V základu této edice jsou nové stroje (12):

Historická letadla:
1903 Wright Flyer
1915 Curtiss JN-4 Jenny
1927 Ryan NYP Spirit of St. Louis
1935 Douglas DC-3 classic
1937 Grumman G-21A Goose
1947 de Havilland DHC-2 Beaver (+ Amphibious Floatplane - plováky)
1947 Hughes H4 Hercules (Spruce Goose – největší dřevěný letoun)

Moderní airliner:
Airbus A310-300 (plně studiový model s vysokou věrností)

Helikoptéry:
Guimbal Cabri G2
Bell Model 407

Kluzáky:
DG Aviation LS8-18
DG-1001E neo

Co se týče herních možností, tak je ve hře samozřejmě "Flight Training" se 7 oddíly, jež vás naučí pilotáži. Pak je zde sekce "Discovery Flights", kde si můžete zalétat na některých vybraných zajímavých místech světa a kochat se krásami různých lokací, jako jsou třeba egyptské pyramidy, Singapur, San Francisko, Mekka a další... U některých lokací je třeba nejprve stáhnout detailnější verzi dané lokace (zdarma). Je zde 11 lokací v základu a dalších 26 je třeba dostahovat, celkem tedy 37. Dále jsou zde "Activities", kde jsou různé tématické výzvy: přistávání (3), bush trips (3), TOP GUN Maverick s F/A-18, Dune - ze světa Duny, 40th Anniversary - mise z minulých dílů, nebo si můžete nějaké mise stáhnout z Marketplace. Pro volné létání je zde sekce "World Map", kde si prostě vyberete jakékoliv místo, odkud chcete startovat a kam máte namířeno a lítat si dle libosti. Samozřejmě jsou zde všechny letiště, včetně i těch nejmenších v malých zapadlých městečkách někde na Moravě. :) Lze si vybrat jakékoliv letadlo s několika barevnými variantami, počasí, denní dobu, či počasí a denní dobu nastavit i na aktuální stav. Můžete klidně umístit velký Boeing 747, nebo Airbus A320 i na ono malé travnaté letiště někde v Prdelákově a zkusit s ním odstartovat. Já to zkusil a nechal startovat autopilota - ne, nezvládl to. Nedokázal nabrat rychlost a zastavil. :) Ale třeba stíhačka F/A-18 to zvládla. :)
Přes šikovné menu, jež se objeví po najetí myší na horní okraj obrazovky se dá během hry měnit a ovládat řada věcí. Zapínat autopilota, teleportovat se do větší výšky, měnit počasí a denní dobu, přepínat kameru atd, atd...
Hra se dá ovládat myší a klávesnicí, ale lepší je použít joystick. Pomocí myši můžete ovládat i ovládací prvky v kokpitu letadla. No..., nebudu vám lhát, moc mi to nešlo. :) Třeba v sérii Sturmovik se mi daří létat docela obstojně, ale u malých civilních letadel je ovládání poněkud složitější. Pokusím se s letadlem klasicky zatočit, nakloním ho a mírně zvednu čumák (jako ve Sturmoviku), ale ovládání má takové zpoždění, že po každém pokusu zatočit se mi pořád letadlo naklání střídavě na jednu a druhou stranu, protože to pořád přeháním, až to divoké kolébání nezvládnu a letadlo se pod šíleným úhlem řítí k zemi. Konzultoval jsem to s AI a to mi řeklo, že tenhle problém má hodně nezkušených hráčů. Pilotování malých civilních letadel, jež dosahují malých rychlostí je údajně daleko obtížnější, než hbité a rychle reagující stíhačky z druhé světové války. Ovšem zajímavé, že stejný problém mám i se stíhačkou F/A-18 - ta by snad měla také reagovat hbitě??? Musí se prý různě přenastavit citlivost jednotlivých os joysticku a používat jakési trimování. Pokusil jsem se na to pomocí onoho AI přijít na kloub, joystick přenastavit, ale je to na mě prostě moc složitý a nepomáhá to. Ale i tak je celkem zábavné, si na mapě světa vytyčit nějakou trasu, zapnout autopilota a jen se rozhlížet a kochat. :)
Multiplayer:
Lze létat offline, nebo se přepnout do online světa a potkávat ostatní hráče. Zkoušel jsem to, ale ostatní hráči byli jen na minimapě a i když jsem měl být blízko nějakého letadla, tak jsem žádné neviděl...
Plusy:
NAPROSTO LUXUSNÍ 4K grafika přírody i kokpitu!!!
Přímo v menu je Marketplace, kde si do hry můžete stáhnout dodatečný obsah od komunity. Jsou tam i věci zdarma. Třeba je tam detailnější mapa centrálně-východní Evropy přímo od Microsoftu (Central Eastern Europe - 15,4 GB). Nebo jsou tam, rovněž zdarma, enhanced verze letadel A310-300, A320neo a DC-3.
Mínusy:
Tradičně vysoká cena.
Po instalaci hry na Steamu se ještě musíte přihlásit na XBox Game Studio Microsoft účtem.
Po instalaci hry ze Steamu (asi cca 1,5 GB - ano je to podezřele málo) si hra stáhne ze serverů Microsoftu dalších asi 163 GB. Stahování není moc vychytané. Ano, můžete ho třeba zapauzovat, když potřebujete, ale když se třeba přepojíte během stahování z wi-fi na kabel, nebo se vám seknou Windows, jako se stalo zrovna mě, tak stahování začíná úplně od začátku. :( Navíc hra ještě po 6 letech dostává časté updaty a třeba po prvním týdnu se mi stahovalo před spuštěním dalších 380 MB updatů.
Nechápu, proč nemá hra žádné označení verze, takhle se bude plést s jinými díly (jako by to byla první verze).

Vzhledem k tomu, že vyšla v roce 2020, tak jsem mu dal neoficiálně do závorky tohle datum - někde se to tak také uvádí. Simulátor samozřejmě vylepšil hlavně grafickou stránku hry. Stačí se podívat na grafické scenérie v tomto, nebo tomto videu a budete slintat blahem. ) Co se týče letadel, tak základní Standard Edition měla při vydání 20 kusů Turbovrtulové Daher TBM 930 Beechcraft King Air 350i Cessna 208 B Grand Caravan EX Moderní airlinery Airbus A320neo ( v2) Boeing 747-8 Intercontinental Vrtulové Diamond DA62 EXTRA 330LT Flight Design CTSL ICON A5 JMB VL-3 Robin Cap10 Robin DR400 100 Cadet Beechcraft Bonanza G36 Cessna 152 Cessna 172 SkyHawk (G1000) (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi) Zlin Savage Cub CubCrafters X Cub (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi) Diamond DA40NG Aviat Pitts Special S-2S Tryskové Cessna Citation CJ4 V bezplatném updatu v listopadu 2021 přibylo dalších 5 Tryskové Boeing F A-18E F Super Hornet Turbovrtulové Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 floats (plováky) Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter skis (lyže) Aviat Pitts Special S-1S CubCrafters NXCub Volocopter VoloCity (eVTOL létající taxi) 40th Anniversary Edition v listopadu 2022 na 40. výročí vydání prvního Flight Simulátoru byla hra bezplatně povýšena na tuhle edici. Nový obsah této edice (kromě placených přídavků) je majitelům základní hry k dispozici zdarma. V základu této edice jsou nové stroje (12) Historická letadla 1903 Wright Flyer 1915 Curtiss JN-4 Jenny 1927 Ryan NYP Spirit of St. Louis 1935 Douglas DC-3 classic 1937 Grumman G-21A Goose 1947 de Havilland DHC-2 Beaver ( Amphibious Floatplane - plováky) 1947 Hughes H4 Hercules (Spruce Goose největší dřevěný letoun) Moderní airliner Airbus A310-300 (plně studiový model s vysokou věrností) Helikoptéry Guimbal Cabri G2 Bell Model 407 Kluzáky DG Aviation LS8-18 DG-1001E neo Co se týče herních možností, tak je ve hře samozřejmě "Flight Training" se 7 oddíly, jež vás naučí pilotáži. Pak je zde sekce "Discovery Flights", kde si můžete zalétat na některých vybraných zajímavých místech světa a kochat se krásami různých lokací, jako jsou třeba egyptské pyramidy, Singapur, San Francisko, Mekka a další... U některých lokací je třeba nejprve stáhnout detailnější verzi dané lokace (zdarma). Je zde 11 lokací v základu a dalších 26 je třeba dostahovat, celkem tedy 37. Dále jsou zde "Activities", kde jsou různé tématické výzvy přistávání (3), bush trips (3), TOP GUN Maverick s F A-18, Dune - ze světa Duny, 40th Anniversary - mise z minulých dílů, nebo si můžete nějaké mise stáhnout z Marketplace. Pro volné létání je zde sekce "World Map", kde si prostě vyberete jakékoliv místo, odkud chcete startovat a kam máte namířeno a lítat si dle libosti. Samozřejmě jsou zde všechny letiště, včetně i těch nejmenších v malých zapadlých městečkách někde na Moravě. ) Lze si vybrat jakékoliv letadlo s několika barevnými variantami, počasí, denní dobu, či počasí a denní dobu nastavit i na aktuální stav. Můžete klidně umístit velký Boeing 747, nebo Airbus A320 i na ono malé travnaté letiště někde v Prdelákově a zkusit s ním odstartovat. Já to zkusil a nechal startovat autopilota - ne, nezvládl to. Nedokázal nabrat rychlost a zastavil. ) Ale třeba stíhačka F A-18 to zvládla. ) Přes šikovné menu, jež se objeví po najetí myší na horní okraj obrazovky se dá během hry měnit a ovládat řada věcí. Zapínat autopilota, teleportovat se do větší výšky, měnit počasí a denní dobu, přepínat kameru atd, atd... Hra se dá ovládat myší a klávesnicí, ale lepší je použít joystick. Pomocí myši můžete ovládat i ovládací prvky v kokpitu letadla. No..., nebudu vám lhát, moc mi to nešlo. ) Třeba v sérii Sturmovik se mi daří létat docela obstojně, ale u malých civilních letadel je ovládání poněkud složitější. Pokusím se s letadlem klasicky zatočit, nakloním ho a mírně zvednu čumák (jako ve Sturmoviku), ale ovládání má takové zpoždění, že po každém pokusu zatočit se mi pořád letadlo naklání střídavě na jednu a druhou stranu, protože to pořád přeháním, až to divoké kolébání nezvládnu a letadlo se pod šíleným úhlem řítí k zemi. Konzultoval jsem to s AI a to mi řeklo, že tenhle problém má hodně nezkušených hráčů. Pilotování malých civilních letadel, jež dosahují malých rychlostí je údajně daleko obtížnější, než hbité a rychle reagující stíhačky z druhé světové války. Ovšem zajímavé, že stejný problém mám i se stíhačkou F A-18 - ta by snad měla také reagovat hbitě??? Musí se prý různě přenastavit citlivost jednotlivých os joysticku a používat jakési trimování. Pokusil jsem se na to pomocí onoho AI přijít na kloub, joystick přenastavit, ale je to na mě prostě moc složitý a nepomáhá to. Ale i tak je celkem zábavné, si na mapě světa vytyčit nějakou trasu, zapnout autopilota a jen se rozhlížet a kochat. ) Multiplayer Lze létat offline, nebo se přepnout do online světa a potkávat ostatní hráče. Zkoušel jsem to, ale ostatní hráči byli jen na minimapě a i když jsem měl být blízko nějakého letadla, tak jsem žádné neviděl... Plusy NAPROSTO LUXUSNÍ 4K grafika přírody i kokpitu!!! Přímo v menu je Marketplace, kde si do hry můžete stáhnout dodatečný obsah od komunity. Jsou tam i věci zdarma. Třeba je tam detailnější mapa centrálně-východní Evropy přímo od Microsoftu (Central Eastern Europe - 15,4 GB). Nebo jsou tam, rovněž zdarma, enhanced verze letadel A310-300, A320neo a DC-3. Mínusy Tradičně vysoká cena. Po instalaci hry na Steamu se ještě musíte přihlásit na XBox Game Studio Microsoft účtem. Po instalaci hry ze Steamu (asi cca 1,5 GB - ano je to podezřele málo) si hra stáhne ze serverů Microsoftu dalších asi 163 GB. Stahování není moc vychytané. Ano, můžete ho třeba zapauzovat, když potřebujete, ale když se třeba přepojíte během stahování z wi-fi na kabel, nebo se vám seknou Windows, jako se stalo zrovna mě, tak stahování začíná úplně od začátku. ( Navíc hra ještě po 6 letech dostává časté updaty a třeba po prvním týdnu se mi stahovalo před spuštěním dalších 380 MB updatů. Nechápu, proč nemá hra žádné označení verze, takhle se bude plést s jinými díly (jako by to byla první verze).
review_english: Another version of the civil flight simulator from Microsoft. This time, Microsoft entrusted the production to the French studio Asobo, which is responsible for, for example, the action adventure game A Plague Tale with great graphics. To make things more confusing, the game has no version designation. Considering that it was released in 2020, I unofficially put this date in parentheses - it is also stated that way somewhere. Of course, the simulator mainly improved the graphics side of the game. Just look at the graphic scenery in this or this video and you will be drooling with happiness. ) As for aircraft, the basic Standard Edition had 20 turboprops Daher TBM 930 Beechcraft King Air 350i Cessna 208 B Grand Caravan EX Modern airliners Airbus A320neo (v2) Boeing 747-8 Intercontinental Propellers Diamond DA62 EXTRA 330LT Flight Design CTSL ICON A5 JMB VL-3 Robin Cap10 Robin DR400 100 Cadet Beechcraft Bonanza G36 Cessna 152 Cessna 172 SkyHawk (G1000) (including variants with floats and skis) Zlin Savage Cub CubCrafters X Cub (including variants with floats and skis) Diamond DA40NG Aviat Pitts Special S-2S Jets Cessna Citation CJ4 The free update in November 2021 added 5 more Jets Boeing F A-18E F Super Hornet Turboprops Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 floats (floats) Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter skis (skis) Aviat Pitts Special S-1S CubCrafters NXCub Volocopter VoloCity (eVTOL flying taxi) 40th Anniversary Edition in November 2022 on the 40th anniversary of the release of the first Flight Simulator was a game upgraded to this edition for free. New content in this edition (excluding paid add-ons) is available for free to owners of the base game. New machines form the basis of this edition (12) Historic aircraft 1903 Wright Flyer 1915 Curtiss JN-4 Jenny 1927 Ryan NYP Spirit of St. Louis 1935 Douglas DC-3 classic 1937 Grumman G-21A Goose 1947 de Havilland DHC-2 Beaver (Amphibious Floatplane - floats) 1947 Hughes H4 Hercules (Spruce Goose's largest wooden plane) Modern airliner Airbus A310-300 (full studio model with high fidelity) Guimbal Cabri G2 Bell Model 407 helicopters DG Aviation LS8-18 gliders DG-1001E neo As for game options, the game includes "Flight Training" with 7 sections that teach you how to fly. Then there is the "Discovery Flights" section, where you can fly to some selected interesting places in the world and enjoy the beauty of various locations, such as the Egyptian pyramids, Singapore, San Francisco, Mecca and others... For some locations, you must first download a more detailed version of the given location (free). There are 11 locations in the base and another 26 need to be completed, so a total of 37. There are also "Activities", where there are various thematic challenges of landing (3), bush trips (3), TOP GUN Maverick with F A-18, Dune - from the world of Dune, 40th Anniversary - missions from past parts, or you can download some missions from the Marketplace. For free flying, there is a "World Map" section, where you simply choose any place where you want to start and where you are headed and fly as you wish. Of course, all the airports are here, including the smallest ones in small remote towns somewhere in Moravia. ) You can choose any aircraft with several color variants, weather, time of day, or set the weather and time of day to the current status. You can easily place a large Boeing 747 or an Airbus A320 even on that small grassy airport somewhere in Prdelákov and try to take off with it. I tried and let the autopilot start - no, it didn't make it. He could not pick up speed and stopped. ) But, for example, the F A-18 fighter could do it. ) Many things can be changed and controlled during the game through the handy menu that appears after hovering the mouse over the top edge of the screen. Turn on the autopilot, teleport to a higher height, change the weather and time of day, switch the camera, etc, etc... The game can be controlled with a mouse and keyboard, but it is better to use a joystick. You can also use the mouse to control the controls in the cockpit of the plane. Well... I won't lie to you, I didn't do very well. ) For example, in the Sturmovik series, I manage to fly quite well, but with small civilian aircraft, control is somewhat more complicated. I try to turn the plane classically, tilt it and raise the nose slightly (like in Sturmovik), but the controls are so laggy that after every attempt to turn, the plane keeps tilting alternately to one side and the other, because I keep overdoing it until I can't handle the wild rocking and the plane crashes to the ground at a crazy angle. I consulted the AI ​​and it told me that a lot of inexperienced players have this problem. Piloting small civilian aircraft that reach low speeds is said to be far more difficult than the nimble and fast-reacting fighters of World War II. However, it is interesting that I have the same problem with the F A-18 fighter - perhaps it should also react quickly??? It is said that the sensitivity of the individual axes of the joystick must be adjusted differently and some kind of trimming must be used. I tried to figure it out with the help of that AI, joystick over build, but it's just too complicated for me and it doesn't help. But it's still quite fun to draw a route on the world map, turn on the autopilot and just look around and enjoy. ) Multiplayer You can fly offline or switch to the online world and meet other players. I tried it, but the other players were only on the minimap and even if I was supposed to be close to some plane, I didn't see any... Pros ABSOLUTELY LUXURIOUS 4K graphics of nature and cockpit!!! Right in the menu is the Marketplace, where you can download additional content from the community into the game. There are also free things. For example, there is a more detailed map of Central-Eastern Europe directly from Microsoft (Central Eastern Europe - 15.4 GB). Or there are, also free, enhanced versions of the A310-300, A320neo and DC-3 aircraft. Cons Traditionally high price. After installing the game on Steam, you still need to sign in to XBox Game Studio with a Microsoft account. After installing the game from Steam (about 1.5 GB - yes, it's suspiciously small), the game downloads another 163 GB from Microsoft's servers. Downloading is not very fancy. Yes, you can pause it when you need to, but if you switch from Wi-Fi to a cable during the download, or your Windows crashes, as happened to me, the download starts from the beginning. ( In addition, the game still receives frequent updates after 6 years, and after the first week, for example, I was downloading another 380 MB of updates before starting. I don't understand why the game has no version designation, this way it will be confused with other parts (as if it was the first version).

review:
As I am writing this review, the game is still downloading - not even close to halfway the total of 130gb after 49 hours.
Yes, that's right. It's been downloading for 49 hours.

I have yet to be able to even actually start playing the game.

So for those who quickly want to try this out to see if it's something for them: *just don't* and go try some other flight sim first, because  there is no way you can try it and get reimbursed if you don't like it.
The download comes through an xbox installation manager, so in steam it is registered as playing time..

Now as for me, this download farce (which has been going on for years apparently) makes give this a big thumbs down. 
The game might be great (we'll see, I'm a patient man), and I might enjoy it very much, but it won't change to a positive review because it is simply criminal negligence by microsoft not to have dealt with such a big well known issue from the start.

PS: I have tried different methods (VPN and other workarounds), but nothing worked to speed things up a little.

PPS: having been able to finally play this game: it looks amazing (flying by Naples at sunset is a treat) and it seems to work flawlessly so far.
That being said, the fact it takes literal days to download still doesn't make it a thumbs up for me.

review: The Graphics are great; but trying to fly an airliner from say London to Frankfurt is fraught with all sorts of problem; e g Airport objects, vehicles, forklift trucks etc in middle of taxiways { I have a screen shot  of  A windsock in the middle of a major taxiway junction. When you do finaly get to designated runway other  planes block your way very often until they just fade out or in some cases taxi straight through you. and that's another bind starting your journey inside another aircraft. Anyway we have been given permission to line up and take off  part way down you take off roll you realise there are planes taking off towards you  or when retuning to Heathrow planes are landing from the opposite end.  The go to your destination is bad  , like I pressed go to LHR whilst over France in a 747  what actually happened we were doing 220knots at 100 feet over the English Channel .BAD ?????? n previous editions you not only had a proper world map, but you Had an alphabetical list of all the countries of the  world with many of there airports and you just selected one in one country and then the other in another country and hey presto the flight plan and of you went.  Now you have an amorphus globe with little white dots on it which you have to  guess and zoom in a lot to even read. review:
[h1]Review zu Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) 40th Anniversary Edition[/h1]

Der Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) gehört zweifellos zu den technisch beeindruckendsten Spielen der letzten Jahre. Bereits vor dem Release sorgten die ersten Gameplay-Vorführungen für Aufsehen, denn Microsoft und Asobo Studio versprachen nichts Geringeres als eine nahezu vollständige digitale Nachbildung unseres Planeten. Satellitendaten, Luftaufnahmen, Cloud-Technologien und Echtzeit-Wetter sollten eine Flugsimulation erschaffen, die ihresgleichen sucht.

Und tatsächlich: Der Flight Simulator liefert genau das. Gleichzeitig bringt er aber auch einige Probleme mit sich, die insbesondere Neueinsteiger kennen sollten.

Bereits die ersten Minuten vermitteln eindrucksvoll, wie ambitioniert dieses Projekt ist. Statt einzelner Karten oder Regionen steht dem Spieler praktisch die gesamte Erde zur Verfügung. Egal ob Großstädte, Gebirge, Küstenregionen oder kleine Dörfer – nahezu jeder Ort der Welt kann angeflogen werden. Selbst das eigene Zuhause kann entdeckt werden.

Besonders beeindruckend ist dabei die grafische Darstellung. Wettereffekte, Wolkenformationen, Sonnenauf- und -untergänge sowie die Beleuchtung sorgen regelmäßig für Momente, in denen man vergisst, dass man gerade ein Videospiel spielt.

Der Flight Simulator ist eines der wenigen Spiele, bei denen das bloße Umherreisen bereits einen Großteil des Spielspaßes ausmachen kann.

Der wohl beeindruckendste Aspekt des Spiels ist die digitale Nachbildung der Erde.
Es ist ein besonderes Gefühl, den eigenen Wohnort, den letzten Urlaubsort oder berühmte Sehenswürdigkeiten aus der Luft zu betrachten. Selbst Spieler, die normalerweise wenig Interesse an Flugsimulationen haben, könnten allein durch diesen Entdeckungsaspekt Gefallen am Spiel finden.

Die 40th Anniversary Edition erweitert das ohnehin schon umfangreiche Basisspiel zusätzlich um weitere Flugzeuge, historische Maschinen, Hubschrauber und zusätzliche Inhalte.

Der Flight Simulator kann sowohl als anspruchsvolle Simulation als auch als vergleichsweise entspannte Flugerfahrung genutzt werden. Zahlreiche Assistenzsysteme helfen Einsteigern beim Starten, Navigieren und Landen. Gleichzeitig können erfahrene Simulationsfans nahezu sämtliche Hilfen deaktivieren.

Dadurch spricht das Spiel unterschiedliche Zielgruppen an, ohne sich ausschließlich auf Hardcore-Piloten zu konzentrieren.

Allerdings gibt es auch einige Hürden.
Eine davon begegnet dem Spieler bereits vor dem eigentlichen Spielstart.
Obwohl das Spiel über Steam heruntergeladen wird, ist die Installation nach dem ersten Start noch lange nicht abgeschlossen. Stattdessen muss ein erheblicher Teil der Daten erst innerhalb des Spiels heruntergeladen und installiert werden.
Das empfinde ich als äußerst problematisch. Bevor man den Flight Simulator überhaupt richtig ausprobieren kann, läuft bereits Spielzeit auf Steam auf. Unter Umständen kann dies dazu führen, dass die Rückerstattungsfrist überschritten wird, bevor man überhaupt beurteilen konnte, ob das Spiel auf dem eigenen System zufriedenstellend läuft oder den eigenen Erwartungen entspricht.
Für mich wirkt das wie eine äußerst fragwürdige und fiese Geschäftspraktik, die insbesondere bei einem Spiel dieser Größe und Downloadmenge unangenehm auffällt.

Die beeindruckende Grafik hat selbstverständlich ihren Preis. Der Flight Simulator gehört auch Jahre nach seiner Veröffentlichung noch zu den anspruchsvolleren Spielen auf dem Markt. Je nach Einstellungen, Flugzeugtyp und Region können die Hardwareanforderungen erheblich ausfallen.
Zusätzlich ist das Spielerlebnis stark von einer stabilen Internetverbindung abhängig, sofern man die umfangreichen Online-Datenströme nutzen möchte.
Hinzu kommen gelegentliche Bugs, Streaming-Probleme oder Darstellungsfehler, die bei einem Projekt dieser Größenordnung zwar verständlich, aber dennoch vorhanden sind.

Wer klassische Missionen, eine Kampagne oder ständig neue Herausforderungen sucht, könnte sich relativ schnell langweilen. Der Flight Simulator lebt nicht von einer Handlung oder einem Progressionssystem, sondern vom Fliegen selbst.
Viele Stunden verbringt man damit, Flugrouten zu planen, Instrumente zu bedienen, Wetterbedingungen zu berücksichtigen oder einfach Landschaften zu erkunden.
Für Simulationsfans ist genau das der Reiz. Für andere SpielerInnen kann es hingegen schnell monoton wirken.

[h3]Gutes & Schlechtes:[/h3]

[u][b]Pro:[/b][/u]

+ Technisch beeindruckende Darstellung
+ Nahezu die gesamte Erde frei erkundbar
+ Fantastische Wetter- und Wolkeneffekte
+ Hoher Realismusgrad
+ Viele Flugzeuge und Inhalte
+ 40th Anniversary Edition erweitert das Spiel sinnvoll
+ Geeignet für Einsteiger und Profis
+ Entspannendes Spielerlebnis
+ Beeindruckender Entdeckungsfaktor
+ Man kann mit Passagierflugzeugen sogar loopings fliegen. Hab dann gerne Schreie eingefügt von YouTube die durch das Flugzeug gedämpft waren, war witzig

[u][b]Contra:[/b][/u]

- Zusätzliche Ingame-Installation nach dem Steam-Download dadurch entstehen mögliche Probleme mit der Steam-Rückerstattung durch die Installationszeit
- Sehr hoher Speicherbedarf. Ein Grund warum das Spiel zurzeit nicht auf meiner Platte installiert ist
- Hohe Hardwareanforderungen
- Teilweise starke Abhängigkeit von einer Internetverbindung
- Gelegentliche Bugs und Streaming-Probleme
- Für Nicht-Simulationsfans möglicherweise schnell eintönig

[u][b]Prontra:[/b][/u]

Der Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) – 40th Anniversary Edition ist weniger ein klassisches Spiel als vielmehr eine technische Demonstration dessen, was moderne Simulationen heute leisten können. Die Möglichkeit, nahezu jeden Ort der Erde zu besuchen, ist bis heute beeindruckend und sorgt regelmäßig für echte Wow-Momente.

Gleichzeitig verlangt das Spiel Geduld, Interesse an Luftfahrt und die Bereitschaft, sich auf ein vergleichsweise langsames Spielerlebnis einzulassen. Wer Action, eine spannende Kampagne oder permanente Fortschrittssysteme sucht, wird hier vermutlich nicht glücklich.

Der Flight Simulator bleibt eine beeindruckende Flugsimulation und eines der technisch faszinierendsten Spiele seiner Generation. Für Luftfahrtbegeisterte ist er nahezu alternativlos, für alle anderen vor allem ein außergewöhnlicher virtueller Reiseführer rund um den Globus.

Ich danke fürs Lesen und wünsche sehr viel Spaß beim Spielen! ;-)

Satellitendaten, Luftaufnahmen, Cloud-Technologien und Echtzeit-Wetter sollten eine Flugsimulation erschaffen, die ihresgleichen sucht. Und tatsächlich Der Flight Simulator liefert genau das. Gleichzeitig bringt er aber auch einige Probleme mit sich, die insbesondere Neueinsteiger kennen sollten. Bereits die ersten Minuten vermitteln eindrucksvoll, wie ambitioniert dieses Projekt ist. Statt einzelner Karten oder Regionen steht dem Spieler praktisch die gesamte Erde zur Verfügung. Egal ob Großstädte, Gebirge, Küstenregionen oder kleine Dörfer nahezu jeder Ort der Welt kann angeflogen werden. Selbst das eigene Zuhause kann entdeckt werden. Besonders beeindruckend ist dabei die grafische Darstellung. Wettereffekte, Wolkenformationen, Sonnenauf- und -untergänge sowie die Beleuchtung sorgen regelmäßig für Momente, in denen man vergisst, dass man gerade ein Videospiel spielt. Der Flight Simulator ist eines der wenigen Spiele, bei denen das bloße Umherreisen bereits einen Großteil des Spielspaßes ausmachen kann. Der wohl beeindruckendste Aspekt des Spiels ist die digitale Nachbildung der Erde. Es ist ein besonderes Gefühl, den eigenen Wohnort, den letzten Urlaubsort oder berühmte Sehenswürdigkeiten aus der Luft zu betrachten. Selbst Spieler, die normalerweise wenig Interesse an Flugsimulationen haben, könnten allein durch diesen Entdeckungsaspekt Gefallen am Spiel finden. Die 40th Anniversary Edition erweitert das ohnehin schon umfangreiche Basisspiel zusätzlich um weitere Flugzeuge, historische Maschinen, Hubschrauber und zusätzliche Inhalte. Der Flight Simulator kann sowohl als anspruchsvolle Simulation als auch als vergleichsweise entspannte Flugerfahrung genutzt werden. Zahlreiche Assistenzsysteme helfen Einsteigern beim Starten, Navigieren und Landen. Gleichzeitig können erfahrene Simulationsfans nahezu sämtliche Hilfen deaktivieren. Eine davon begegnet dem Spieler bereits vor dem eigentlichen Spielstart. Obwohl das Spiel über Steam heruntergeladen wird, ist die Installation nach dem ersten Start noch lange nicht abgeschlossen. Stattdessen muss ein erheblicher Teil der Daten erst innerhalb des Spiels heruntergeladen und installiert werden. Das empfinde ich als äußerst problematisch. review_english: h1 Review of Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) 40th Anniversary Edition h1 Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) is undoubtedly one of the most technically impressive games of recent years. Even before the release, the first gameplay demonstrations caused a stir, because Microsoft and Asobo Studio promised nothing less than an almost complete digital replica of our planet. Satellite data, aerial photography, cloud technologies and real-time weather should create a flight simulation that is second to none. And Flight Simulator actually delivers exactly that. At the same time, it also brings with it some problems that newcomers in particular should be aware of. The first few minutes already convey impressively how ambitious this project is. Instead of individual maps or regions, the player has practically the entire earth at his disposal. Whether it's big cities, mountains, coastal regions or small villages, almost every place in the world can be reached. Even your own home can be discovered. The graphical representation is particularly impressive. Weather effects, cloud formations, sunrises and sunsets, and lighting regularly create moments where you forget you're playing a video game. Flight Simulator is one of the few games where just traveling around can be a large part of the fun. Perhaps the most impressive aspect of the game is the digital recreation of Earth. It's a special feeling to see your place of residence, your last vacation spot or famous sights from the air. Even players who normally have little interest in flight simulations might enjoy the game just for this discovery aspect. The 40th Anniversary Edition expands the already extensive base game with additional aircraft, historical machines, helicopters and additional content. The Flight Simulator can be used both as a sophisticated simulation and as a comparatively relaxed flight experience. Numerous assistance systems help beginners take off, navigate and land. At the same time, experienced simulation fans can deactivate almost all aids. This means the game appeals to different target groups without focusing exclusively on hardcore pilots. However, there are also some hurdles. The player encounters one of them before the game actually starts. Although the game is downloaded via Steam, the installation is far from complete after the first launch. Instead, a significant portion of the data must first be downloaded and installed within the game. I find this extremely problematic. Before you can even really try out Flight Simulator, the game time is already running on Steam. Under certain circumstances, this can result in the refund deadline being exceeded before you can even assess whether the game runs satisfactorily on your system or meets your expectations. To me, this seems like an extremely questionable and nasty business practice, which is particularly unpleasant for a game of this size and download volume. Of course, the impressive graphics have their price. Even years after its release, Flight Simulator is still one of the more demanding games on the market. Depending on settings, aircraft type and region, hardware requirements can vary significantly. In addition, the gaming experience is heavily dependent on a stable internet connection if you want to use the extensive online data streams. There are also occasional bugs, streaming problems or display errors, which are understandable but still present in a project of this size. Anyone looking for classic missions, a campaign or constantly new challenges could get bored relatively quickly. Flight Simulator lives not from a plot or a progression system, but from flying itself. Many hours are spent planning flight routes, operating instruments, taking weather conditions into account or simply exploring landscapes. For simulation fans, that's exactly the appeal. For other players, however, it can quickly seem monotonous. h3 Good Bad h3 u b Pro b u Technically impressive presentation Almost the entire earth can be freely explored Fantastic weather and cloud effects High level of realism Lots of aircraft and content 40th Anniversary Edition expands the game in a meaningful way Suitable for beginners and professionals Relaxing gaming experience Impressive discovery factor You can even fly loops with passenger aircraft. I then liked to add screams from YouTube that were muffled by the plane, it was funny u b Contra b u - Additional in-game installation after the Steam download, which creates possible problems with the Steam refund due to the installation time - Very high memory requirements. One reason why the game is not currently installed on my hard drive - High hardware requirements - Sometimes heavily dependent on an internet connection - Occasional bugs and streaming problems - For non-simulation fans it may quickly become monotonous u b Prontra b u - Very slow game pace - Hardly any classic game goals - Players often have to set their own goals - Long training period for more complex aircraft The Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) 40th Anniversary Edition is less of a classic game than rather a technical demonstration of what modern simulations can achieve today. The opportunity to visit almost every place on earth is still impressive today and regularly provides real wow moments. At the same time, the game requires patience, an interest in aviation and the willingness to engage in a comparatively slow gaming experience. Anyone looking for action, an exciting campaign or permanent progression systems will probably not be happy here. Flight Simulator remains an impressive flight simulation and one of the most technically fascinating games of its generation. For aviation enthusiasts there is almost no alternative, for everyone else it is above all an extraordinary virtual travel guide around the globe. Thank you for reading and I hope you enjoy playing! -) code Are you interested in more reviews like this? Then visit my url code

review:
Член мне в рот. Купил игру по новогодний акции за 7500 тенге так она стоит 20000 и это просто попа, обьясняю купил ее два месяца назад так и не поиграл изначально при скачивании лаунчера тебе говорят: скачать игру весом в 150 гигов что будет грузиться в среднем при показатели в 30м/с весь день та и еще что В ПЕРВУЮ ОЧЕРЕДЬ тебе надо регистрироваться в Microsoft но получится только если у вас международная эл.почта но это еще так раслабон после того как ты создаешь учетную запись и начинаешь скачивать игру ТЫ ЖДЕШЬ 6 ЧАСОВ СПЕЦИАЛЬНО ЧТОБ ИГРУ НЕЛЬЗЯ БЫЛО ВЕРНУТЬ И ПРИ ЛЮБОМ ПЕРЕЗАХОДЕ ОТКРЫТИИ ЛАУНЧЕРА ТЕБЕ НАХЕР СНОСЯТ УЧЕТНУЮ ЗАПИСЬ (БЛОКИРУЮТ) ТИПА ИЗ ЗА НАРУШЕНИЙ ПРАВИЛ MICROSOFT. Я так понимаю это из за того что ты находишься на территории СНГ то есть ты покупаешь игру за 20000 К тенге (3658 рублей), создаешь учетную запись с международной эл.почтой, качаешь игру 6 часов не в чем не подазривая и тебя нахер сносят, блокируют учетную запись, а так как ты уже типо наиграл 6,5 часиков ТЫ НЕ МОЖЕШЬ ВЕРНУТЬ ЕЕ. В итоге я просрал 1500 руб (7500 тенге) по скидке, не поиграв ни секунды,
вернуть не могу, остался с не выполненой мечтой поиграть в хороший авиа симулятор, и с плохим мнением о Microsoft. КАТЕГОРИЧЕСКИ, ТАТАЛЬНО не советую тем у кого бабло с неба не сыпется и бо вы просто посмотрите на красивые самолетики нарисованные Майкрософтом при заставке. На этом у меня все, спасибо за внимание...

review_english: Dick in my mouth. I bought the game for a New Year's promotion for 7500 tenge, so it costs 20,000 and it's just a butt, I'll explain, I bought it two months ago and never played it initially, when you download the launcher, they tell you to download a game weighing 150 gigs, which will load on average at 30m all day long, and also that FIRST, you need to register with Microsoft, but this will only work if you have an international account email, but it’s still so relaxing after you create an account and start downloading the game YOU WAIT 6 HOURS SPECIFICALLY SO THAT THE GAME CAN’T BE RETURNED AND WHEN YOU RESET TO OPEN THE LAUNCHER, YOU WILL FUCK YOUR ACCOUNT (BLOCKED) TYPE DUE TO VIOLATIONS OF MICROSOFT RULES. As I understand it, this is due to the fact that you are in the CIS, that is, you buy a game for 20,000 K tenge (3,658 rubles), create an account with international email, download the game for 6 hours without suspecting anything, and they fucking demolish you, block your account, and since you’ve already supposedly played 6.5 hours, YOU CAN’T GET IT BACK. As a result, I spent 1,500 rubles (7,500 tenge) at a discount, without playing a second, I can’t return it, I was left with an unfulfilled dream of playing a good flight simulator, and with a bad opinion about Microsoft. CATEGORICALLY, TOTALLY I don’t recommend it to those who don’t have money falling from the sky and just look at the beautiful airplanes drawn by Microsoft in the screensaver. That's all for me, thanks for your attention...

review:
It worked fine for ages, now it wants to verify my age but neither of the buttons do anything when clicked so I cannot play it any more. Yet more enshittification from Microslop, I'm so sick of it, software seems to only be getting worse :-(

UPDATE: Despite running it several times, the same problem occurred (non-responsive buttons), even in Safe Mode. However, today it started working to my (pleasant) surprise!

POSSIBLE SOLUTION:
I restarted MSFS several times, at least twice in Safe Mode. I suspect that it must have at some point decided to skip the Verify Age section as possibly not working so maybe try restarting a few times including in Safe Mode a few times. Hope it makes it work for you :-)

----------------

Microsoft Flight Simulator stands as an ambitious and technically impressive entry in the long-running aviation series, offering a remarkably authentic experience that appeals to both enthusiasts and casual players. Its scale is immediately striking, presenting a near-entire recreation of the Earth using advanced mapping and cloud technology. The simulation prioritises realism, yet remains accessible through a range of assistance options. As a result, it succeeds in bridging the gap between hardcore simulation and broader appeal.
Gameplay is centred around flight mechanics that are both detailed and scalable in complexity. Aircraft handling feels authentic, with each plane offering distinct characteristics that demand careful attention. Tutorials and assistance systems ensure that newcomers are not overwhelmed, while advanced simulation settings cater to experienced pilots. The variety of missions, challenges, and free-flight options keeps the experience engaging over extended periods.
Visually, the simulator is exceptional, delivering some of the most realistic environments seen in modern gaming. Cities, landscapes, and weather systems are rendered with remarkable fidelity, creating an ever-changing and dynamic world. The lighting and atmospheric effects contribute significantly to immersion, particularly during sunrise and sunset flights. Minor inconsistencies in terrain detail can appear, but they rarely detract from the overall visual achievement.
Overall, Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) delivers a compelling and technically sophisticated experience that sets a high standard for the genre. Its combination of accessibility, depth, and visual excellence ensures broad appeal without sacrificing authenticity. While it may not cater to those seeking fast-paced action, it excels as a meditative and richly detailed simulation. The result is a highly rewarding title that showcases the potential of modern simulation technology.
Microsoft Flight Simulator gets a 6/10.

review:
👍 Recommended (195 hours)

After nearly 200 hours in MSFS 2020, I can confidently say this is one of the most impressive simulators ever made—but it’s not for everyone.

What’s amazing:

The world simulation is insane. Flying anywhere on Earth with real satellite data still feels unreal even after hundreds of hours.
Weather, lighting, and atmosphere are next-level immersive—sunsets and storms never get old.
Huge variety of aircraft, from small props to airliners.
Regular updates have improved the game a lot since launch.

What’s not so great:

Performance can still be rough. You need a strong PC to get smooth gameplay.
The install/update system is… painful. It uses a separate launcher and can take forever.
Requires a Microsoft/Xbox login even on Steam, which is annoying.
Default airliners are decent, but not super deep unless you install mods.

Real talk:
This is more of a hobby platform than a casual game. If you enjoy aviation, navigation, or just chilling while flying over real places, it’s incredible. If you want instant action, you’ll probably get bored.

Steam reviews overall are “Mostly Positive” (~78%), which fits: amazing experience, but with technical frustrations.

Verdict:
👍 Worth it — especially if you’re into flight sims or want a relaxing, immersive experience.

review:
Every year or two that I return to try and play this game, I am regularly reminded why it is that I don't. From not being able to sign-in, to experiencing download issues, to not even recognizing my controllers, it is guaranteed to be an agonizingly miserable fight just to get in-game, let alone having my controllers function and actually be able to get in air.

Out of the 80 hours I have in this game, less than 2 of them are actually flying. The rest has just been downloading the game, struggling to sign-in, or troubleshooting one of the millions of issues I deal with this absolutely broken piece of code.

Not only can I not recommend this, but I actively encourage anyone to avoid trying this game. Not only would it be more productive, but you would have a much more enjoyable experience watching paint dry than playing Microslop Fight Stimulator 2020.

review:
É um jogo sobre paciência.

Paciência pra baixar, descomprimir o jogo e lidar com os problemas da instalação, que, por vezes, podem te fazer baixar tudo de novo. (A dica é, deixe bem mais espaço do que o jogo pede no inicio do download, porque depois de descomprimir ele aumenta bastante, e o instalador não te avisa nada, só fica descomprimindo infinitamente)

Paciência para logar sua conta da Microsoft no jogo, pois provavelmente vai aparecer só uma tela preta depois que você colocar o email e a senha e ficar travado. (A dica é, não faça o login com a senha, use um método alternativo, como receber o código por celular)

Paciência pra lidar com os crashs que vão acontecer com poucos minutos de jogo. (A dica é, otimize o jogo pelo aplicativo da Nvidia e configure o Windows pra alocar memória dinamicamente)

Paciência pra aprender a voar com os treinamentos. (Que são muito legais, mas a avaliação das notas é bem aleatória, você faz um voo todo estranho e recebe A e outro certinho e recebe B)

Paciência pra voar seguindo corretamente os procedimentos e diretrizes de voo. (Afinal, isso aqui é um simulador, eu sei que o jogo é seu mas o mais legal é simular certinho) 

E depois de tudo isso, vem o motivo que vai te exigir mais paciência, mesmo com todos os cuidados e ajustes, seu jogo vai fechar do nada as vezes, não tem remédio e é aleatório, cedo ou tarde acontece, o que resta é aceitar e conviver com isso.

Se você teve paciência pra ler até aqui, então ai vai minha recomendação:
Se eu pudesse, daria uma avaliação neutra, porque minha recomendação pra você sobre esse jogo depende do seu perfil de jogador:

Se você é um entusiasta de simuladores e da aviação, eu recomendo, pode comprar, porque mesmo com todos os problemas, na hora que funciona vale muito a pena. (esse é meu caso, por isso vou deixar a análise como positiva)

Se você está apenas curioso sobre como é ou pretendia comprar pra jogar de forma mais casual, eu não recomendo, acho que é melhor você jogar esse jogo pelo YouTube mesmo, vai dar menos dor de cabeça.

Seja qual for o seu perfil, se decidir encarar, use as dicas acima pra facilitar as coisas e economizar tempo, mas não precisa ter pressa pra testar o jogo, porque todo o processo é feito com o jogo aberto, sendo assim, você provavelmente não vai conseguir reembolsar, então pense com paciência antes de comprar.

review_english: It's a game about patience. Patience to download, decompress the game and deal with installation problems, which can sometimes make you download everything all over again. (The tip is, leave a lot more space than the game asks for at the beginning of the download, because after decompressing it increases a lot, and the installer doesn't warn you anything, it just keeps decompressing infinitely) Be patient when logging in to your Microsoft account in the game, as you'll probably just see a black screen after you enter your email and password and get stuck. (The tip is, optimize the game using the Nvidia application and configure Windows to dynamically allocate memory) Patience to learn to fly with the training. (Which are very cool, but the evaluation of the grades is very random, you do a strange flight and receive an A and another exactly and receive a B) Patience to fly correctly following the flight procedures and guidelines. (After all, this is a simulator, I know it's your game but the coolest thing is to simulate correctly) And after all this, comes the reason that will require you more patience, even with all the care and adjustments, your game will close out of nowhere sometimes, there's no remedy and it's random, sooner or later it happens, what's left is to accept and live with it. If you had the patience to read this far, then here is my recommendation If I could, I would give a neutral evaluation, because my recommendation for you about this game depends on your player profile. If you are a simulator and aviation enthusiast, I recommend it, you can buy it, because even with all the problems, when it works, it's really worth it. (this is my case, so I'll leave the review as positive) If you're just curious about what it's like or intend to buy it to play more casually, I don't recommend it, I think it's better to play this game on YouTube, it'll be less of a headache. Whatever your profile, if you decide to take on it, use the tips above to make things easier and save time, but you don't need to rush to test the game, because the entire process is done with the game open, therefore, you probably won't be able to refund, so think patiently before buying.

review:
Well I have not played this in a long time but wanted to write a short review before I uninstall it to free some space.
I remember the disastrous launch, but after a year or so things were much improved and overall it is a revolutionary addition to the series.
Clearly the standout "feature" this game gave birth to was the incredible realtime streaming of map data, which opened up the entire earth to explore. For those that don't know, Earth_DM is quite a large map as far as games go.
I'll never forget the first time I flew over my own house.. absolutely incredible.
..until I realised I really need to clean all the crap up out back, since it can apparently be seen from space.

MSFS 2024 is obviously the way to go, now that it is starting to mature.. but I'd assume 2020 could be handy for a performance boost, plus I know certain things are still only possible in this version.

Честно говоря, раньше почти не интересовался авиасимуляторами. Думал — не мое. Но эта игра реально зацепила. И я ни разу не пожалел что купил её
Это не просто игра — ты буквально ощущаешь, насколько сложна эта профессия. Когда видишь всю эту детализацию, графику и полностью открытый мир — понимаешь: вот оно, новое поколение. У тебя в компьютере — целая планета.
Отдельный кайф — летать над своим домом. Реально видеть свои улицы с высоты — очень необычное и даже немного странно..
Да, игра требовательная, но если у вас довольно крепкий самовар, смело покупайте!
По реалистичности и проработке — это вообще другой уровень. Многие игры даже близко не стояли к Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 - Итог: Покупайте, не пожелаете. Игра сложная и не для всех, но уверяю, эмоции будут очень яркими и запоминающими!

review:
O Microsoft Flight Simulator  e um simulador de voo extremamente realista e impressionante visualmente. O que mais gostei foi o nivel de detalhes dos avioes e dos cenarios, que reproduzem cidades e paisagens do mundo inteiro com muita fidelidade. A sensacao de pilotar e envolvente, principalmente para quem gosta de aviacao ou procura uma experiencia mais tranquila e imersiva.

Por outro lado o jogo exige um computador potente e bastante espaco de armazenamento.
No geral recomendo o jogo para quem gosta de simuladores e busca uma experiencia realista de voo.

Por outro lado o jogo exige um computador potente e bastante espaco de armazenamento. No geral recomendo o jogo para quem gosta de simuladores e busca uma experiencia realista de voo.
review_english: Microsoft Flight Simulator is an extremely realistic and visually impressive flight simulator. What I liked most was the level of detail in the planes and scenes, which reproduce cities and landscapes from around the world very faithfully. The sensation of flying is immersive, especially for those who like aviation or are looking for a calmer and more immersive experience. On the other hand, the game requires a powerful computer and plenty of storage space. Overall, I recommend the game for anyone who likes simulators and is looking for a realistic flying experience.

review_english: I have something to say. First of all, if you came to watch YouTube, check your computer first. review:
Je fais du pilotage en ligne depuis maintenant 7 ans avec 300 heures cumulées sur le 2020 et le 2024 je peux certifier que le 2020 est pour ma part plus intéressant.
Ce logiciel est parfait pour la simulation avancée avec beaucoup de matériel mais également pour du loisir.
Attention, grosse config PC attendue pour une immersion totale.

また、フライトスティックなどの最低限飛行機を飛ばせるものは必要です
padでも出来はすると思いますが、フライトスティックをおすすめします(1万円以上)

review: Oyun güzel. Açıkçası klavyeden oynanabilecek bir oyun değil. Ya bir tane xbox/playstation kolu veya bir tane uçak joyistick'lerden alınırsa uçağı kontrol etmek daha kolay olur. Grafik anlamında gayet yeterli ki bazıları xplane 12 ile karşılaştırıyor. Rtx 3080 10GB+Ryzen 5 7500f+32gb ram kullandığım halde işlemciden kaynaklı bir darboğaz yaşıyorum ve 45 fps geçemiyorum. Bu sorun muhtemelen benden kaynaklı çünkü rtx4060 ve benle aynı işlemciye sahip başkası yayınla beraber oyunu 60 fps de rahat oynanabiliyor. Oyunda uçaklar çok fazla ama oyunun bize default olarak verdiği uçaklarda idare eder. Eğer sadece yolcu uçağı kullanan biri olmak istiyorsanız yolcu uçakları yetersiz kalabiliyor. Marketplace de uçaklar satılıyor ama çoğu oyundaki a320 den baz alınarak yapılıyor.

review_english: The game is beautiful. Frankly, it is not a game that can be played from the keyboard. It will be easier to control the plane if you buy either an Xbox Playstation controller or an airplane joystick. It is quite sufficient in terms of graphics that some compare it with xplane 12. Even though I use Rtx 3080 10GB Ryzen 5 7500f 32gb ram, I am experiencing a bottleneck due to the processor and I cannot exceed 45 fps. This problem is probably caused by me, because the game can be played easily at 60 fps when streaming with an rtx4060 and someone else with the same processor as me. There are a lot of planes in the game, but the planes that the game gives us by default are just fine. If you want to be someone who only flies passenger planes, passenger planes may be insufficient. Planes are sold on the Marketplace, but most of them are based on the A320 in the game.

review:
Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is a very good game, but the account and DRM setup is still anti consumer. 

A paid game should not require Arxan Anti Tamper DRM and a separate Xbox or Microsoft account just to access the full product. The Steam version also requires a third party account. That adds more dependency, less ownership, and more ways for legitimate customers to run into login or access issues.

The sim itself is impressive. The account and DRM layer is not. Without those extra restrictions, I would view this much more positively.

review:
Jeu plutôt réaliste, c’est indéniable, et c’est clairement l’un de ses plus gros points forts. Le niveau de détail est impressionnant, que ce soit au niveau des paysages, des conditions météorologiques ou encore du comportement des avions. On ressent vraiment le travail qui a été fait pour proposer une simulation immersive.

Cependant, ce réalisme a aussi un revers. Les tutoriels sont très brefs et pas forcément intuitifs. Pour un joueur qui n’est pas déjà passionné d’aviation ou habitué aux simulateurs, la prise en main peut vite devenir compliquée. Beaucoup de mécaniques ne sont pas expliquées en profondeur, ce qui peut rapidement décourager. On se retrouve souvent à devoir chercher des informations ailleurs pour comprendre correctement le fonctionnement du jeu.

Le jeu manque également d’objectifs clairs. En dehors du plaisir de voler et de visiter différents lieux à travers le monde, il y a peu de choses qui viennent réellement motiver sur le long terme. Il n’y a pas de progression marquante, ni de véritable fil conducteur qui pousse à continuer. Pour certains joueurs, cela peut donner une impression de vide ou de répétitivité après quelques heures.

En résumé, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 est une excellente simulation, très aboutie techniquement, mais qui s’adresse surtout à un public déjà intéressé par l’aviation. Les joueurs plus occasionnels risquent de se sentir un peu perdus et de décrocher faute d’accompagnement et d’objectifs concrets.

review_english: A rather realistic game, that's undeniable, and that's clearly one of its biggest strengths. The level of detail is impressive, whether in terms of landscapes, weather conditions or even the behavior of the planes. We really feel the work that has been done to offer an immersive simulation. However, this realism also has a downside. The tutorials are very brief and not necessarily intuitive. For a player who is not already passionate about aviation or used to simulators, getting started can quickly become complicated. Many mechanics are not explained in depth, which can quickly become discouraging. We often find ourselves having to look elsewhere for information to correctly understand how the game works. The game also lacks clear objectives. Apart from the pleasure of flying and visiting different places around the world, there are few things that really motivate you in the long term. There is no significant progression, nor a real common thread that pushes us to continue. For some players, this can feel empty or repetitive after a few hours. In summary, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is an excellent simulation, very technically accomplished, but which is mainly aimed at an audience already interested in aviation. More casual players risk feeling a little lost and dropping out due to lack of support and concrete objectives.

review:
购买前提醒，此游戏购买后需要下载180G的内容，如果你的网速不是能在2小时内下完的你将不能退款
游戏性：通过mod可以实现较为拟真的模拟飞行体验，但大部分的MOD都需要额外花钱购买普遍在100元—200元，部分高级厂商制作的高拟真机型价格较高如 Fenix A320系列（50英镑）inibuilds A350等，当然也有免费的高拟真但缺失部分小功能的机型
fly by wire A320 A380
游戏质量：非常吃CPU！！！12400F+4060在高空巡航开启中画质和帧生成只有80帧，进近加载官方提供的部分高清地景时只有40帧左右，普通地景60帧，游戏内的ATC（航空管制）运行逻辑是有问题的，需要将系统语言的非U语言调为英文才可大大避免大部分bug，风景非常好看，可以在全世界任何一个地方开始飞行
