review_english: Warning before purchase: This game requires downloading 180G of content after purchase. If your Internet speed cannot be downloaded within 2 hours, you will not be able to get a refund. Gameplay: A more realistic simulated flight experience can be achieved through mods, but most MODs require additional money to purchase, usually 100 yuan or 200 yuan. Some high-end manufacturers produce high-fidelity models with higher prices, such as the Fenix A320 series, 50 pounds, inibuilds A350, etc. Of course, there are also free high-fidelity models that lack some small functions. Fly by wire A320 A380 The game quality is very CPU-hungry 12400F 4060. When high-altitude cruise is turned on, the picture quality and frame generation are only 80 frames. When loading some official high-definition scenery during the approach, it is only about 40 frames. Ordinary scenery is 60 frames. There is a problem with the ATC air traffic control in the game. The operating logic is problematic. You need to adjust the non-U language of the system language to English to greatly avoid most bugs. The scenery is very beautiful and you can start flying anywhere in the world.

review:
La verdad, siendo honesto, juegazo.
Este juego logra ser bastante jugable gracias a su realismo y telemetría en el mundo y aunque haya salido el MSFS2024 no lo he comprado debido que no creo que me me vaya muy bien en mi laptop y que no es tan estable, pero el MSFS2020 todavía sigue activo con una gran comunidad.
Puede llegar a ser aun mas disfrutable si te puedes lograr comprar Yokes o Sidesticks como los que usan en los Airbus/Boeing para tener una sensación más realista al pilotar aviones, también hay más accesorios que venden los cuales pueden ser como el MCDU, Thrusters, y más.
También puedes lograr instalar mods o conseguir aviones, aeropuertos y "liveries" (los diseños del aviones como los de aerolíneas, para dar un ejemplo, Air France).
También tiene comunidades como VATSIM, IVAO y más que hacen simulaciones aún mas realistas ya que simulan el contacto de torre de control con el piloto logrando una experiencia más real y fiel a la realidad.

Y bueno eso es todo, por favor Microsoft o Xbox hagan más juegos como estos.

review_english: The truth is, to be honest, it's a great game. This game manages to be quite playable thanks to its realism and telemetry in the world and although MSFS2024 has been released I have not bought it because I don't think it will work very well on my laptop and it is not that stable, but MSFS2020 is still active with a large community. And well that's all, please Microsoft or Xbox make more games like these.

review:
Horas jogadas: muitas
Resultado: virei turista virtual do planeta Terra.

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 basicamente me deu **acesso ao mundo inteiro**. Você escolhe um aeroporto, liga o avião e pode literalmente voar para qualquer lugar do planeta. Já fiz voos só para passar por cidades famosas, montanhas gigantes e até lugares aleatórios que eu achei no mapa.

Às vezes eu começo um voo sério… plano de voo, altitude, tudo certinho.
10 minutos depois estou voando a 200 pés sobre uma cidade aleatória pensando:
“Será que minha casa aparece aqui?”

Os gráficos são absurdos. As nuvens, o pôr do sol e o clima fazem parecer que você está vendo um documentário ou algo filmado da vida real. Em alguns momentos eu simplesmente desligo o piloto automático mental e fico só olhando a paisagem.

Os aviões são muito detalhados. Tem cockpit cheio de botão, sistema de verdade e várias coisas que eu definitivamente não sei usar. Resultado: já desliguei motor sem querer mais vezes do que gostaria de admitir.

Pontos positivos:

* Você pode voar para literalmente qualquer lugar do mundo
* Gráficos lindos
* Muitos aviões
* Muito relaxante

Pontos negativos:

* Meu PC virou uma turbina de avião
* Eu ainda não sei pousar direito

Resumo:
Comprei um simulador de voo.
Ganhei um **Google Earth que voa**.

Recomendo.

review_english: Many hours played Result I became a virtual tourist on planet Earth. Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 basically gave me access to the entire world. You choose an airport, turn on the plane and you can literally fly anywhere on the planet. I've taken flights just to pass by famous cities, giant mountains and even random places I found on the map. Sometimes I start a serious flight, flight plan, altitude, everything just right. 10 minutes later I'm flying at 200 feet over a random city wondering Does my house show up here? The graphics are absurd. The clouds, sunset and weather make it feel like you are watching a documentary or something filmed from real life. At times I simply turn off my mental autopilot and just look at the landscape. The planes are very detailed. It has a cockpit full of buttons, a real system and several things that I definitely don't know how to use. As a result, I've accidentally turned off the engine more times than I'd like to admit. Positive points You can fly to literally anywhere in the world Beautiful graphics Lots of planes Very relaxing Negative points My PC turned into an airplane turbine I still don't know how to land properly Summary I bought a flight simulator. I got a Google Earth that flies. I recommend.

Flying an aircraft feels akin to figthing it - the trim controls (the ability to maintain a level fligth) are buggy, inconsistent and otherwise fail to work. All the expensive peripherals in the world, wont fix something that is fundamentally broken.

Edit: Tried playing for an additional 24 hours - nope - still a piece of microshit. 
Performance is a joke - you can have a supercomputer and the gameplay will be stuck at 35-40 FPS. 

Edit: Played for an additional 22 hours - This was such a waste of a purchase - The planes fight you all the time and nothing seems to work. Never. Again.

Dont even bother with a discount purchase - avoid at all costs

review: Bu oyunu stres atmak için aldım ama daha fazla stres yaptı, 60 saatim olmuş hala tam anlamıyla her şeyine hakim değilim, oyunu tam teşekkül oynamak istiyorsanız oturup kitap defter çalışmanız gerekiyor ancak öğrendikten sonra kesinlikle daha da keyifli oluyor. Fiyat kısmına gelirsek, oyun pahalı bir oyun ancak bu fiyat buz dağının görünen kısmı, gerçekten tadını çıkararak oynamak istiyorsanız bu oyunun fiyatının 3 misli kadarı daha paranız olmalı en az. Sebepleriyse şu şekilde oyunu klavyeyle oynayabilecek adam gerçekten ermiştir, o sebeple bir joystick veya klavyeden daha iyi bir seçenek olan ps veyahut xbox kolu gerekecektir. Bir süre sonra oyunun sunduğu uçaklardan fazlasını isteyeceksiniz, kaliteli ve ücretsiz olan 1 bilemedin 2 model vardır, bunların dışı kaliteli modeller oyunun iki misli neredeyse. Kısaca bu oyunu alacaksanız hem kafası çalışan bir kişi artı olarak da burjuva sınıfına mensup olmanız gerek.

review_english: I bought this game to relieve stress, but it made me even more stressed. I've played it for 60 hours and I'm still not completely familiar with everything. If you want to play the game fully, you have to sit down and study it book by book, but once you learn it, it's definitely more enjoyable. As for the price, the game is expensive, but this price is the tip of the iceberg. If you really want to enjoy playing it, you should have at least 3 times the price of this game. The reasons are that the person who can play the game with a keyboard is truly a saint, so a PS or Xbox controller will be required, which is a better option than a joystick or keyboard. After a while, you will want more than the planes the game offers, there are 1 or 2 models that are high quality and free, the other quality models are almost twice the size of the game. In short, if you are going to buy this game, you need to be a smart person and also belong to the bourgeois class.

review:
Mise à part quelques petites bidouilles à faire, le jeu fonctionne bien. 
Par contre, je trouve abusé d’inclure un shop dans un jeu qui coûte 70€.

Microsoft Flight Simulator 40th Anniversary Edition, à part quelques bidouilles au lancement, fonctionne bien.
Mais franchement, mettre un shop payant dans un jeu à 70€, c’est abusé.

Points forts
Simulation réaliste et impressionnante : Terre photoréaliste, météo en live, avions fidèles.
Contenu massif dans l’Anniversary Edition : nouveaux avions, aéroports, missions Bush Trips.
Mise à jour régulière avec de nouveaux contenus gratuits.

Points faibles
Shop Marketplace intrusif : avions, aéroports, liveries payantes en plus du prix de base.
Installation/config parfois capricieuse (bidouilles nécessaires).
Demande une bonne connexion internet pour les données en temps réel.

Note : 8/10. Simulation exceptionnelle, mais le shop payant gâche un peu l’expérience "premium".

Je le recommande aux passionnés d’aviation, de simulation réaliste, et à ceux qui acceptent le modèle “base + DLC”.
Si tu détestes les shops dans les jeux chers, réfléchis à deux fois.

Voilà voilà !

Mise à jour régulière avec de nouveaux contenus gratuits. Points faibles Shop Marketplace intrusif avions, aéroports, liveries payantes en plus du prix de base. Installation config parfois capricieuse (bidouilles nécessaires). Demande une bonne connexion internet pour les données en temps réel. Note 8 10. Simulation exceptionnelle, mais le shop payant gâche un peu l expérience "premium". Je le recommande aux passionnés d aviation, de simulation réaliste, et à ceux qui acceptent le modèle base DLC . Si tu détestes les shops dans les jeux chers, réfléchis à deux fois. Voilà voilà !
review_english: Apart from a few small tweaks to do, the game works well. On the other hand, I find it abusive to include a shop in a game that costs 70. Microsoft Flight Simulator 40th Anniversary Edition, apart from a few tweaks at launch, works well. But frankly, putting a paying shop in a 70 game is overkill. Highlights Realistic and impressive simulation Photorealistic earth, live weather, faithful aircraft. Massive content in the Anniversary Edition new planes, airports, Bush Trips missions. Regularly updated with new free content. Weak points Shop Marketplace intrusive planes, airports, paid deliveries in addition to the base price. Config installation sometimes capricious (tinkering required). Requires a good internet connection for real-time data. Rating 8 10. Exceptional simulation, but the paid shop spoils the "premium" experience a little. I recommend it to fans of aviation, realistic simulation, and to those who accept the basic DLC model. If you hate shops in expensive games, think again. There you go!

review:
Microsoft Flight Simulator — це неймовірно якісний і деталізований авіасимулятор. Світ виглядає вражаюче реалістично, моделі літаків пропрацьовані до дрібниць, а польоти дарують справжнє відчуття масштабу та свободи. Гра чудово передає атмосферу реальної авіації — від погодних умов до роботи приладів у кабіні.

Але варто врахувати: без джойстика або хоча б простого HOTAS-комплекту повноцінно відчути цей симулятор складно. На клавіатурі чи геймпаді можна грати, але саме з контролером для авіасимів з’являється той самий «вау-ефект» і точність керування.

Якщо є відповідне обладнання — це один із найкращих авіасимуляторів на ринку.

Гра чудово передає атмосферу реальної авіації від погодних умов до роботи приладів у кабіні. Але варто врахувати без джойстика або хоча б простого HOTAS-комплекту повноцінно відчути цей симулятор складно. На клавіатурі чи геймпаді можна грати, але саме з контролером для авіасимів з являється той самий вау-ефект і точність керування. Якщо є відповідне обладнання це один із найкращих авіасимуляторів на ринку.
review_english: Microsoft Flight Simulator is an incredibly high-quality and detailed flight simulator. The world looks impressively realistic, the aircraft models are detailed, and the flights give a real sense of scale and freedom. The game perfectly conveys the atmosphere of real aviation, from weather conditions to the operation of instruments in the cockpit. But it is worth considering that without a joystick or at least a simple HOTAS kit, it is difficult to fully experience this simulator. You can play on a keyboard or a gamepad, but it is with the flight sim controller that the same wow effect and control precision appear. If you have the right equipment, this is one of the best flight simulators on the market.

review: Despues de haber jugado bastantes horas, es momento de dar mi opinión. El juego en si, es una maravilla. Tiene sus "pequeños" bugs, pero es mucho mas estable que el 2024, que sin menospreciar su continuación, hasta que no esté completamente estabilizado y que los mods y Add-ons funcionen al 100% como en el 2020, permaneceré aquí. Para tener una experiencia de primer nivel, se recomienda tener una pc potente para poder exprimirlo, de lo contrario se sufre. En mi caso con un Ultra Wide 9, una 5080 y 64 GB de Ram, corre excelente. A veces hay caídas de FPS en ciertos aeropuertos de mayor complejidad, pero éso se resuelve bajando un poco la calidad gráfica sin sacrificar demasiado. Espero que Asobo resuelva problemas con el 2024 y lo deje bien afinado para pasar definitivamente. Mientras tanto, seguiré disfrutando del 2020.

It has its "small" bugs, but it is much more stable than 2024, which without underestimating its continuation, until it is completely stabilized and the mods and Add-ons work 100% as in 2020, I will remain here. To have a first-class experience, it is recommended to have a powerful PC to be able to squeeze it out, otherwise you will suffer. In my case with an Ultra Wide 9, a 5080 and 64 GB of Ram, it runs excellent. Sometimes there are FPS drops in certain more complex airports, but this is resolved by lowering the graphic quality a little without sacrificing too much. I hope Asobo solves problems with 2024 and leaves it well tuned to pass definitively. In the meantime, I will continue enjoying 2020.

review:
Mostly a great flight simulator, especially for a pilot like me. Somewhat playable in VR as well, though if possible for anyone, i would recommend only to play in VR. 
Sadly the game has a lot of issues with performance, where especially in VR, things will just sometimes not load. The "Ready to Fly" button may sometimes not show and will require the entire flight to be restarted. The "toolbar" being similar, where even with the button, it will simply not show, causing things needed to not being able to be done. However on the other hand, it is a quite beautiful game, despite the fact, it tends to suffer from either bad performance near big cities or be outdated in smaller cities.

review:
MFS2020 is a masterpiece, a monumental achievement in gaming, photgrammetry, and simulation....yet, it is not for everyone. 

How can a masterpiece of a game not be for everyone you might ask? Well the answer for this is simple. This is not a normal "game" in the sense that most people are familiar with. MFS2020 lacks a narrative, has no real missions, no career mode (although it should), no characters, etc. So why play it? For what is lacks in story and progression, it makes up for with its near-infinite sandbox, graphical fidelity, simulation depth, and learning curve. 

I've been playing MFS since 2006 when I was just ten years old and got my hands on MFS X. I was instantly addicted to the difficulty and the beauty of that game. And over time, little pre-teen me was able to figure out how to fly airliners in an age when youtube tutorials were in their infancy. 

14 years later, MFS2020 released with the announcement that by using a combination of satellite photogrammetry and hand crafted models, Microsoft had essentially put the entire Earth into the video game. You can literally fly over your house--at least as it appeared on Bing Maps in 2020 anyway, you can see every house in your community, follow the traffic down the road you take to work, see landmarks around the world, and so on. Moreover, they implemented a system to import live weather conditions, which combined with the improved volumetric weather and cloud system produces insanely life-like simulation. It's truly an achievement that few other games can boast. 

What you are left with is a game that will absolutely satisfy you if you are a fan of aviation, hardcore simulation, or just want to sit back and soar above the clouds while listening to music or an audiobook. The sandbox is yours to do what you want. You can fly a little prop plane around your community, or roleplay as an airline captain with routes and rigid checklists and so on. 

But again, this is not an experience for everyone. There are many people who will boot this up, play for a few hours,  and say "okay so this is it?" And that's fine.  But if you want to dig into a deep, beautiful simulation game, the sky is the limit.

review:
Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is one of the most impressive simulation games ever released, and even years later, it still feels like a benchmark title for what a modern simulator can be. It is not just a game where you fly planes from one airport to another. It is a full aviation sandbox that gives you the entire world, thousands of airports, real weather, realistic flight systems, beautiful aircraft, and endless opportunities to learn, explore, and improve.

The strongest part of Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is its sense of scale. Being able to take off from your local airport, fly over your own city, cross oceans, visit famous landmarks, land in remote mountain strips, or recreate real airline routes is incredible. The game makes aviation feel global in a way very few titles ever have. Whether you want to fly a short VFR sightseeing route in a Cessna 172 or plan a full IFR airline flight across the country, the game gives you the tools to do it.

The visuals are absolutely outstanding. The world looks gorgeous from the air, especially with live weather, changing cloud layers, sunsets, storms, snow, and realistic lighting. Flying through mountain ranges, along coastlines, over cities, or into busy airports can genuinely feel cinematic. The weather system is one of the biggest highlights because it adds so much atmosphere and challenge. A calm daytime flight feels relaxing, while a night approach in rain, low visibility, and crosswinds can feel intense and rewarding.

The aircraft selection is also a major strength. The simulator gives players a wide range of flying experiences, from small general aviation aircraft to business jets, airliners, turboprops, bush planes, floatplanes, and helicopters depending on your installed content. Each aircraft has its own personality, handling, cockpit layout, and learning curve. Some are great for casual exploration, while others demand more serious study and procedure knowledge. That flexibility is one of the reasons the sim has such long-term value.

For beginners, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is surprisingly approachable. You can turn on assists, use simplified controls, follow tutorials, and slowly build your skills. For more serious sim pilots, there is enough depth to practice navigation, radio work, instrument flying, aircraft systems, flight planning, weather decision-making, and proper procedures. It does a great job of being accessible without completely sacrificing realism. You can treat it like a relaxing flying game or a serious training-style simulator, depending on how much effort you want to put in.

The cockpit experience is excellent. Sitting in a detailed cockpit, managing switches, setting up navigation, adjusting radios, monitoring instruments, and flying an approach gives the sim a strong sense of immersion. With a good joystick, throttle, rudder pedals, or yoke setup, the experience becomes even better. The game rewards hardware investment, but it does not require a full cockpit setup to be enjoyable.

The flight planning and navigation side of the game is another major selling point. You can fly visually by landmarks, use GPS, follow VORs, fly IFR routes, shoot instrument approaches, or use third-party tools to create more realistic airline-style flights. There is a real sense of accomplishment when you plan a route, depart properly, navigate across distance, manage fuel, descend on profile, and land successfully at your destination.

The airport coverage is massive. Even small local airports are represented, and the handcrafted airports add extra detail to major locations. The ability to fly almost anywhere on Earth gives the game unmatched replay value. You are never really “done” with Microsoft Flight Simulator because there is always another route, aircraft, region, airport, weather condition, or challenge to try.

The community and add-on ecosystem are also huge positives. There are aircraft, liveries, scenery improvements, airports, utilities, mods, and flight planning tools that can dramatically expand the experience. The marketplace and external add-on community help keep the simulator fresh. Whether you are into airliners, bush flying, helicopters, military-style flying, historical aircraft, or general aviation, there is almost always something available to support that niche.

Performance can vary depending on your system, settings, and location, but when the sim is running well, it is one of the most immersive experiences on PC. It is demanding, but that is not surprising considering what it is trying to do. This is a game rendering the entire planet, complex aircraft, weather, traffic, lighting, and huge amounts of scenery. With the right settings dialed in, the experience is absolutely worth it.

One of the best things about Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is that it creates memorable moments constantly. Taking off from a small mountain airport at sunrise, flying over your hometown, landing at a major international airport in bad weather, cruising above cloud layers, or finding a random remote airstrip can all feel special. It captures the freedom and beauty of aviation better than almost anything else.

It also has real educational value. You can learn basic aerodynamics, airport operations, navigation, weather awareness, aircraft systems, and flight procedures. It will not replace real flight training, but it can absolutely help build familiarity with cockpit layouts, navigation concepts, checklists, and aviation terminology. For anyone interested in aviation, it is a fantastic entry point.

Overall, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is a landmark simulator. It is beautiful, detailed, flexible, massive in scope, and endlessly replayable. It works both as a relaxing exploration game and as a serious aviation platform. Whether you are a casual player who wants to see the world from above or an aviation enthusiast who wants to practice realistic procedures, there is a tremendous amount of value here.

Final Verdict: Absolutely recommended. Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is not just one of the best flight simulators available; it is one of the most impressive simulation experiences ever made.

The marketplace and external add-on community help keep the simulator fresh. Whether you are into airliners, bush flying, helicopters, military-style flying, historical aircraft, or general aviation, there is almost always something available to support that niche. Performance can vary depending on your system, settings, and location, but when the sim is running well, it is one of the most immersive experiences on PC. It is demanding, but that is not surprising considering what it is trying to do. This is a game rendering the entire planet, complex aircraft, weather, traffic, lighting, and huge amounts of scenery. With the right settings dialed in, the experience is absolutely worth it. One of the best things about Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is that it creates memorable moments constantly. Taking off from a small mountain airport at sunrise, flying over your hometown, landing at a major international airport in bad weather, cruising above cloud layers, or finding a random remote airstrip can all feel special. It captures the freedom and beauty of aviation better than almost anything else. It also has real educational value. You can learn basic aerodynamics, airport operations, navigation, weather awareness, aircraft systems, and flight procedures. It will not replace real flight training, but it can absolutely help build familiarity with cockpit layouts, navigation concepts, checklists, and aviation terminology. For anyone interested in aviation, it is a fantastic entry point. Overall, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is a landmark simulator. It is beautiful, detailed, flexible, massive in scope, and endlessly replayable. It works both as a relaxing exploration game and as a serious aviation platform. Whether you are a casual player who wants to see the world from above or an aviation enthusiast who wants to practice realistic procedures, there is a tremendous amount of value here. Final Verdict Absolutely recommended. Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020 is not just one of the best flight simulators available it is one of the most impressive simulation experiences ever made.

review:
Další verze civilního leteckého simulátrou od Microsoftu. Microsoft výrobu tentokrát svěřil francouzskému studiu Asobo, jež má na svědomí třeba akční adventuru A Plague Tale se skvělou grafikou. Aby se to lépe pletlo, tak hra nemá žádné označení verze. Vzhledem k tomu, že vyšla v roce 2020, tak jsem mu dal neoficiálně do závorky tohle datum - někde se to tak také uvádí.
Simulátor samozřejmě vylepšil hlavně grafickou stránku hry. Stačí se podívat na grafické scenérie v tomto, nebo tomto videu a budete slintat blahem. :)
Co se týče letadel, tak základní Standard Edition měla při vydání 20 kusů:

Turbovrtulové:
Daher TBM 930
Beechcraft King Air 350i
Cessna 208 B Grand Caravan EX

Moderní airlinery:
Airbus A320neo (+ v2)
Boeing 747-8 Intercontinental

Vrtulové:
Diamond DA62
EXTRA 330LT
Flight Design CTSL
ICON A5
JMB VL-3
Robin Cap10
Robin DR400/100 Cadet
Beechcraft Bonanza G36
Cessna 152
Cessna 172 SkyHawk (G1000) (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi)
Zlin Savage Cub
CubCrafters X Cub (včetně variant s plováky a lyžemi)
Diamond DA40NG
Aviat Pitts Special S-2S

Tryskové:
Cessna Citation CJ4

V bezplatném updatu v listopadu 2021 přibylo dalších 5:

Tryskové:
Boeing F/A-18E/F Super Hornet

Turbovrtulové:
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 floats (plováky)
Pilatus PC-6/B2-H4 Turbo Porter skis (lyže)
Aviat Pitts Special S-1S
CubCrafters NXCub
Volocopter VoloCity (eVTOL – létající taxi)

40th Anniversary Edition: v listopadu 2022 na 40. výročí vydání prvního Flight Simulátoru byla hra bezplatně povýšena na tuhle edici. Nový obsah této edice (kromě placených přídavků) je majitelům základní hry k dispozici zdarma.
V základu této edice jsou nové stroje (12):

Historická letadla:
1903 Wright Flyer
1915 Curtiss JN-4 Jenny
1927 Ryan NYP Spirit of St. Louis
1935 Douglas DC-3 classic
1937 Grumman G-21A Goose
1947 de Havilland DHC-2 Beaver (+ Amphibious Floatplane - plováky)
1947 Hughes H4 Hercules (Spruce Goose – největší dřevěný letoun)

Moderní airliner:
Airbus A310-300 (plně studiový model s vysokou věrností)

Helikoptéry:
Guimbal Cabri G2
Bell Model 407

Kluzáky:
DG Aviation LS8-18
DG-1001E neo

Co se týče herních možností, tak je ve hře samozřejmě "Flight Training" se 7 oddíly, jež vás naučí pilotáži. Pak je zde sekce "Discovery Flights", kde si můžete zalétat na některých vybraných zajímavých místech světa a kochat se krásami různých lokací, jako jsou třeba egyptské pyramidy, Singapur, San Francisko, Mekka a další... U některých lokací je třeba nejprve stáhnout detailnější verzi dané lokace (zdarma). Je zde 11 lokací v základu a dalších 26 je třeba dostahovat, celkem tedy 37. Dále jsou zde "Activities", kde jsou různé tématické výzvy: přistávání (3), bush trips (3), TOP GUN Maverick s F/A-18, Dune - ze světa Duny, 40th Anniversary - mise z minulých dílů, nebo si můžete nějaké mise stáhnout z Marketplace. Pro volné létání je zde sekce "World Map", kde si prostě vyberete jakékoliv místo, odkud chcete startovat a kam máte namířeno a lítat si dle libosti. Samozřejmě jsou zde všechny letiště, včetně i těch nejmenších v malých zapadlých městečkách někde na Moravě. :) Lze si vybrat jakékoliv letadlo s několika barevnými variantami, počasí, denní dobu, či počasí a denní dobu nastavit i na aktuální stav. Můžete klidně umístit velký Boeing 747, nebo Airbus A320 i na ono malé travnaté letiště někde v Prdelákově a zkusit s ním odstartovat. Já to zkusil a nechal startovat autopilota - ne, nezvládl to. Nedokázal nabrat rychlost a zastavil. :) Ale třeba stíhačka F/A-18 to zvládla. :)
Přes šikovné menu, jež se objeví po najetí myší na horní okraj obrazovky se dá během hry měnit a ovládat řada věcí. Zapínat autopilota, teleportovat se do větší výšky, měnit počasí a denní dobu, přepínat kameru atd, atd...
Hra se dá ovládat myší a klávesnicí, ale lepší je použít joystick. Pomocí myši můžete ovládat i ovládací prvky v kokpitu letadla. No..., nebudu vám lhát, moc mi to nešlo. :) Třeba v sérii Sturmovik se mi daří létat docela obstojně, ale u malých civilních letadel je ovládání poněkud složitější. Pokusím se s letadlem klasicky zatočit, nakloním ho a mírně zvednu čumák (jako ve Sturmoviku), ale ovládání má takové zpoždění, že po každém pokusu zatočit se mi pořád letadlo naklání střídavě na jednu a druhou stranu, protože to pořád přeháním, až to divoké kolébání nezvládnu a letadlo se pod šíleným úhlem řítí k zemi. Konzultoval jsem to s AI a to mi řeklo, že tenhle problém má hodně nezkušených hráčů. Pilotování malých civilních letadel, jež dosahují malých rychlostí je údajně daleko obtížnější, než hbité a rychle reagující stíhačky z druhé světové války. Ovšem zajímavé, že stejný problém mám i se stíhačkou F/A-18 - ta by snad měla také reagovat hbitě??? Musí se prý různě přenastavit citlivost jednotlivých os joysticku a používat jakési trimování. Pokusil jsem se na to pomocí onoho AI přijít na kloub, joystick přenastavit, ale je to na mě prostě moc složitý a nepomáhá to. Ale i tak je celkem zábavné, si na mapě světa vytyčit nějakou trasu, zapnout autopilota a jen se rozhlížet a kochat. :)
Multiplayer:
Lze létat offline, nebo se přepnout do online světa a potkávat ostatní hráče. Zkoušel jsem to, ale ostatní hráči byli jen na minimapě a i když jsem měl být blízko nějakého letadla, tak jsem žádné neviděl...
Plusy:
NAPROSTO LUXUSNÍ 4K grafika přírody i kokpitu!!!
Přímo v menu je Marketplace, kde si do hry můžete stáhnout dodatečný obsah od komunity. Jsou tam i věci zdarma. Třeba je tam detailnější mapa centrálně-východní Evropy přímo od Microsoftu (Central Eastern Europe - 15,4 GB). Nebo jsou tam, rovněž zdarma, enhanced verze letadel A310-300, A320neo a DC-3.
Mínusy:
Tradičně vysoká cena.
Po instalaci hry na Steamu se ještě musíte přihlásit na XBox Game Studio Microsoft účtem.
Po instalaci hry ze Steamu (asi cca 1,5 GB - ano je to podezřele málo) si hra stáhne ze serverů Microsoftu dalších asi 163 GB. Stahování není moc vychytané. Ano, můžete ho třeba zapauzovat, když potřebujete, ale když se třeba přepojíte během stahování z wi-fi na kabel, nebo se vám seknou Windows, jako se stalo zrovna mě, tak stahování začíná úplně od začátku. :( Navíc hra ještě po 6 letech dostává časté updaty a třeba po prvním týdnu se mi stahovalo před spuštěním dalších 380 MB updatů.
Nechápu, proč nemá hra žádné označení verze, takhle se bude plést s jinými díly (jako by to byla první verze).

review_english: Another version of the civil flight simulator from Microsoft. This time, Microsoft entrusted the production to the French studio Asobo, which is responsible for, for example, the action adventure game A Plague Tale with great graphics. To make things more confusing, the game has no version designation. Considering that it was released in 2020, I unofficially put this date in parentheses - it is also stated that way somewhere. Of course, the simulator mainly improved the graphics side of the game. Just look at the graphic scenery in this or this video and you will be drooling with happiness. ) As for aircraft, the basic Standard Edition had 20 turboprops Daher TBM 930 Beechcraft King Air 350i Cessna 208 B Grand Caravan EX Modern airliners Airbus A320neo (v2) Boeing 747-8 Intercontinental Propellers Diamond DA62 EXTRA 330LT Flight Design CTSL ICON A5 JMB VL-3 Robin Cap10 Robin DR400 100 Cadet Beechcraft Bonanza G36 Cessna 152 Cessna 172 SkyHawk (G1000) (including variants with floats and skis) Zlin Savage Cub CubCrafters X Cub (including variants with floats and skis) Diamond DA40NG Aviat Pitts Special S-2S Jets Cessna Citation CJ4 The free update in November 2021 added 5 more Jets Boeing F A-18E F Super Hornet Turboprops Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter G950 floats (floats) Pilatus PC-6 B2-H4 Turbo Porter skis (skis) Aviat Pitts Special S-1S CubCrafters NXCub Volocopter VoloCity (eVTOL flying taxi) 40th Anniversary Edition in November 2022 on the 40th anniversary of the release of the first Flight Simulator was a game upgraded to this edition for free. New content in this edition (excluding paid add-ons) is available for free to owners of the base game. New machines form the basis of this edition (12) Historic aircraft 1903 Wright Flyer 1915 Curtiss JN-4 Jenny 1927 Ryan NYP Spirit of St. Louis 1935 Douglas DC-3 classic 1937 Grumman G-21A Goose 1947 de Havilland DHC-2 Beaver (Amphibious Floatplane - floats) 1947 Hughes H4 Hercules (Spruce Goose's largest wooden plane) Modern airliner Airbus A310-300 (full studio model with high fidelity) Guimbal Cabri G2 Bell Model 407 helicopters DG Aviation LS8-18 gliders DG-1001E neo As for game options, the game includes "Flight Training" with 7 sections that teach you how to fly. Then there is the "Discovery Flights" section, where you can fly to some selected interesting places in the world and enjoy the beauty of various locations, such as the Egyptian pyramids, Singapore, San Francisco, Mecca and others... For some locations, you must first download a more detailed version of the given location (free). There are 11 locations in the base and another 26 need to be completed, so a total of 37. There are also "Activities", where there are various thematic challenges of landing (3), bush trips (3), TOP GUN Maverick with F A-18, Dune - from the world of Dune, 40th Anniversary - missions from past parts, or you can download some missions from the Marketplace. For free flying, there is a "World Map" section, where you simply choose any place where you want to start and where you are headed and fly as you wish. Of course, all the airports are here, including the smallest ones in small remote towns somewhere in Moravia. ) You can choose any aircraft with several color variants, weather, time of day, or set the weather and time of day to the current status. You can easily place a large Boeing 747 or an Airbus A320 even on that small grassy airport somewhere in Prdelákov and try to take off with it. I tried and let the autopilot start - no, it didn't make it. He could not pick up speed and stopped. ) But, for example, the F A-18 fighter could do it. ) Many things can be changed and controlled during the game through the handy menu that appears after hovering the mouse over the top edge of the screen. Turn on the autopilot, teleport to a higher height, change the weather and time of day, switch the camera, etc, etc... The game can be controlled with a mouse and keyboard, but it is better to use a joystick. You can also use the mouse to control the controls in the cockpit of the plane. Well... I won't lie to you, I didn't do very well. ) For example, in the Sturmovik series, I manage to fly quite well, but with small civilian aircraft, control is somewhat more complicated. I try to turn the plane classically, tilt it and raise the nose slightly (like in Sturmovik), but the controls are so laggy that after every attempt to turn, the plane keeps tilting alternately to one side and the other, because I keep overdoing it until I can't handle the wild rocking and the plane crashes to the ground at a crazy angle. I consulted the AI ​​and it told me that a lot of inexperienced players have this problem. Piloting small civilian aircraft that reach low speeds is said to be far more difficult than the nimble and fast-reacting fighters of World War II. However, it is interesting that I have the same problem with the F A-18 fighter - perhaps it should also react quickly??? It is said that the sensitivity of the individual axes of the joystick must be adjusted differently and some kind of trimming must be used. I tried to figure it out with the help of that AI, joystick build, but it's just too complicated for me and it doesn't help. But it's still quite fun to draw a route on the world map, turn on the autopilot and just look around and enjoy. ) Multiplayer You can fly offline or switch to the online world and meet other players. I tried it, but the other players were only on the minimap and even if I was supposed to be close to some plane, I didn't see any... Pros ABSOLUTELY LUXURIOUS 4K graphics of nature and cockpit!!! Right in the menu is the Marketplace, where you can download additional content from the community into the game. There are also free things. For example, there is a more detailed map of Central-Eastern Europe directly from Microsoft (Central Eastern Europe - 15.4 GB). Or there are, also free, enhanced versions of the A310-300, A320neo and DC-3 aircraft. Cons Traditionally high price. After installing the game on Steam, you still need to sign in to XBox Game Studio with a Microsoft account. After installing the game from Steam (about 1.5 GB - yes, it's suspiciously small), the game downloads another 163 GB from Microsoft's servers. Downloading is not very fancy. Yes, you can pause it when you need to, but if you switch from Wi-Fi to a cable during the download, or your Windows crashes, as happened to me, the download starts from the beginning. ( In addition, the game still receives frequent updates after 6 years, and after the first week, for example, I was downloading another 380 MB of updates before starting. I don't understand why the game has no version designation, this way it will be confused with other parts (as if it was the first version).

review:
As I am writing this review, the game is still downloading - not even close to halfway the total of 130gb after 49 hours.
Yes, that's right. It's been downloading for 49 hours.

I have yet to be able to even actually start playing the game.

So for those who quickly want to try this out to see if it's something for them: *just don't* and go try some other flight sim first, because  there is no way you can try it and get reimbursed if you don't like it.
The download comes through an xbox installation manager, so in steam it is registered as playing time..

Now as for me, this download farce (which has been going on for years apparently) makes give this a big thumbs down. 
The game might be great (we'll see, I'm a patient man), and I might enjoy it very much, but it won't change to a positive review because it is simply criminal negligence by microsoft not to have dealt with such a big well known issue from the start.

PS: I have tried different methods (VPN and other workarounds), but nothing worked to speed things up a little.

PPS: having been able to finally play this game: it looks amazing (flying by Naples at sunset is a treat) and it seems to work flawlessly so far.
That being said, the fact it takes literal days to download still doesn't make it a thumbs up for me.

Anyway we have been given permission to line up and take off  part way down you take off roll you realise there are planes taking off towards you  or when retuning to Heathrow planes are landing from the opposite end.  The go to your destination is bad  , like I pressed go to LHR whilst over France in a 747  what actually happened we were doing 220knots at 100 feet over the English Channel .BAD ?????? n previous editions you not only had a proper world map, but you Had an alphabetical list of all the countries of the  world with many of there airports and you just selected one in one country and then the other in another country and hey presto the flight plan and of you went.  Now you have an amorphus globe with little white dots on it which you have to  guess and zoom in a lot to even read. review:

Map 'filler' 3D models of buildings is very innacurate for most places (duh) such as smaller cities, etc., and is laughable. Terrain models are not always finalised to levels of detail for things such as flying under bridges (we're talking the whole world is mapped here, so a break is given). 

Overall, the kid in me is wowed after playing early editions of MSFS, being able to do what we can today. 

If you're a flight sim fan, explorer, photographer, buy it (on sale).
